name: Joe Knopp, Candidate for Lt. Governor
subject: I’m Joe Knopp: Christian, Husband, and Father
body:
The DeWine Administration is “UnPlanned”
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkEFvhCAQhX8N3jAKK-rBw263e-u2adKmN4IwrmwFDWK39tcXre2hCUzCe_Ax81TF6lKxSFckIWlK0iJJKE12MWWQFgykykTNRJqiXWLiqzYOrJBSx7I3UVvVkMu6AVZnWc1owdJS0RJUzoqsyEVDo65qvR9GRPeInMIaQU4O4pu2DtQCCdqGxE3v8KX_AGd7F2QD4PG1B_xu-2FA9DR5ww0oPRlEj2CE7hBhizj2k5MQRCs7LszQ6WbeLBmOQl9sMLcBc7wUrg0PbL6yuWydHr0WlrfTWAur-LIb4Vtwv6DeerD-5xPcfr0d9pAV5TnY3HZaBeOf2GoV5j6-Pj69nD-fI1ep4aa7To8sD2Felv7XFLeGK5QfECHrK0LWwMhu3j88t9k8ZDhgsLDmfvHIXah-HuDv4saIt1QIyo_fgjKYuQ)
---
| | Friend,

If I was your typical politician, I would start by bragging about my powerful friends and all the years I’ve been in government. But **I’m not a career politician** , I’m a Christian filmmaker.

A few years ago,I produced an anti-abortion movie called “UnPlanned.” After the last couple of years, that title seems to be more fitting to the DeWine administration.

DeWine wasn’t prepared nor did he plan an effective response to Covid. Instead he used it as an opportunity to punch down on ordinary citizens. Our pain was his pride.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkMtuwyAQRb8G72wZbONk4UXaNJuqD0Vqu0QYJjGJeQjjpv77YtftohKMxL1wmLmyoe1W0kQ1JCcYE7zJ86LIy6yggDcUhKx4SznGqMx1dlHag-FCqExYnXTNVuY5hVaC3NaFaKsSY44LuuFtDlhCm_RNF4IbULFD5BDXAGL0kN2U8SBnSNRWZHqyPj3bT_DG-ihrgJBeLKRXY51DxWEMmmmQatSo2IPmqkeEzuJgRy8gikb0jGvXq9O0WiIeuTqbaK4D1ulcmNIsstnCZqLzagiKG9aNQ8uNZPM-8dCB_wVZE8CEn09S6bbmMVzlx1u0memVjMY_sVMyzr1_f3l9e_46Jr6R7qb6Xg20jmGe5_6XFNeGG1TfIUKWV4QsgZFy2j0du2pyVRoxKTf6YfbIfaxhcvB3cWVkayoE1ftvelqaKQ)
---
| | Churches were non-essential. Your job was canceled. School was closed. Masks were mandated. More than a year later, DeWine still won’t loosen his grip on your freedom.

I vividly remember what it was like in the early days of the pandemic. As a father of 3, **I remember when the classroom was our living room.** As a Christian, I remember when DeWine asked churches to close. As a defender of the unborn, I remember how abortion clinics were labeled essential.

**The DeWine administration is as “UnPlanned” as it can get. **But guess what? Here’s one more thing they didn’t plan on doing - losing the election.

Please consider supporting the campaign today.

I look forward to meeting you all out on the road!

Sincerely,

Joe Knopp
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Ohio
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxNjstuwyAQRb8GdrF4GIwXLNKm2fWhSO2eV2IqIMjYav33xZZbVRqNZu6dObpWct1bDr0kiGBMsECIUtQ2lDssuDOWKc0VxqBFsfn0cXRJGeMbc49wkAY7I5xWXDN-xZ2t9wIJhVjPDUeoh0EO05QLoEdAzrX-EdJsgpuLi8qHFVddFXPw16VOZdbFjD5P_p5K3ee0K9oBeh68rcjTx-vb-8v3BY7S5i8fgi-8qzlvv0S48yToHgAh2xchWxbSLsfny8CWzA4Vc1ApPq0eeax9WrL7O9wZzZZzVbvTDxfeYLI)

I’ve made a custom ActBlue link you can pass along to folks. Please find that link here: = Let me know if you have any additional questions. We’ve got this! Divya | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.**

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: re: our 2022 strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I'd love to hear your thoughts on our 2022 strategy.
#
Hey — it's Nick, Beto's campaign manager.
I just got out of a 2022 strategy meeting with our senior leadership team and wanted to reach out. We have big plans for next year including traveling to every corner of Texas, turning out a historic number of voters, and electing the first Democratic Governor to Texas since 1991.
But one important perspective was missing from our meeting — _yours!_ **This campaign is about all of us, especially the people from places that are often forgotten or overlooked, so I'd love to hear your thoughts on our 2022 strategy.**
[With that in mind, we put together a brief survey. Please, will you represent Pennsylvania and complete our 2022 Strategy Survey?](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211217&t=1&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)
**[Start the survey »](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211217&t=2&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)**
With your help, we will elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott next year, but we need to be clear-eyed about the challenges that lie ahead. Abbott has a $55 million war chest, and his corporate donors will spend whatever it takes to protect their power.
**That's why it's imperative we have a foolproof campaign strategy in place.** Our senior leadership team will be meeting Monday morning to review the results of this survey, and I hope we can count on your response before then.
[**Please take a moment to give your input. It will take just a few seconds and help us run a better campaign.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20211217&t=3&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)
We'll be in touch soon to share our results with you.
Thank you,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211217-167418-footer&t=4&refcode2=167418_444211_oe7kAU&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=5&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=167418%2E444211%2Eoe7kAU)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

THE BAD: Donations are trickling in... and if we don’t raise another $1,900 by midnight tonight -- we’re on track to miss our goal. This goal is critical to ensuring that we can continue to pay for digital ads, on-the-ground organizing, and more for Steve’s grassroots campaign. We did the math, and we need 100 donors from 89053 to chip in to reach our goal. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Our strong grassroots coalition is what makes Steve’s campaign so powerful. And you’re part of it. Without your help, Steve won’t be able to continue the progress he’s made in the state that has changed the lives of millions of Nevadans. name: Congressman Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Going up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
EVERYTHING is getting more expensive [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Everywhere you look, the cost of our everyday life is getting more expensive!Electricity is up **11%**. Hotels are up **25%**. Used cars are up **26%. **Even bacon and brats are more expensive.Wisconsin families are getting squeezed by big-government liberals, and _**we can't wait until 2022 to start fixing it! Are you with me TODAY before things get even worse tomorrow?**_ [PETITION: ADD YOUR NAME TO FIGHT BACK >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are pushing the same worn-out philosophy in Washington: MORE spending and MORE taxes.**But more government isn't going to fix this problem.**_**I need you to join this fight by adding your name to demand Congress STOP THE SPENDING.**_ [Tell Congress To STOP THE SPENDING NOW!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-j/) America's best days ARE still ahead of us, if we're willing to work to make it happen! We didn't get to be the greatest country in history by waiting for "someone else" to step up or get the job done for us. 2022 is going to be the year we take our majority back, and a critical step in taking our country back. **I, for one, can't wait. **Thank You,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-h/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-ckldily-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-ckldily-ahkdjtlkr-o/)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team: Joe Manchin continues to ROADBLOCK _essential_ legislation. | **BREAKING NEWS UPDATE:** **Manchin tells senators he's skeptical Build Back Better can pass this year**
---
**Paid family leave, climate legislation, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda hang in the balance.**

Luckily, we have a plan: to elect more bold Democrats to weigh down his vote!

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to DEMAND Joe Manchin do what’s right and pass the Build Back Better Act »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=6&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=7&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: YOU
DATE: DECEMBER 17, 2021

**Dear Senator Manchin,
** Listen up.

With the Senate majority so slim, passing Joe Biden’s agenda is going to take all Democrats standing up and working together.

President Biden’s Build Back Better bill is sitting in the Senate, waiting for your vote.

**But instead of working with your fellow Democrats, you are standing in the way of progress!**

[I’m enraged, Senator, so right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to expand the Senate Majority -- because I REFUSE to let you stonewall all the work we need to get done »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=8&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=9&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Enough is enough, Senator — MAGA Mitch McConnell is laughing in our faces!

**If you refuse to stand up for Democratic priorities, our only choice is to expand the Senate majority and drown out your vote.**

The people of your state _(and the whole country)_ deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and PASS the Build Back Better act.

[So right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to do just that! It’s time to elect more Democrats who will vote to protect the American people »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=10&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=11&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A CONCERNED DEMOCRAT_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4441?t=12&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1024%2E878179%2EoRX3r4)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Make it possible for a conservative student
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbheq2sbuthdqt8sbrsbhddmo18l49c9dqoihsu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t72ctgbcc5nccq6cd3im6rj6obj6mqj3cdietj79dlkcopm4ptj6epr4or3m2rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb2pjmc2pm8dtim5j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5r27fh2dbajrss6k5unckotuuffjni37dmc74co_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1g1utfrc3mk2t1l7u6ccdnlup2423heb3vpeaao_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zebhl3hiummtpcb8jfecvgov81ag718s9vat62l0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb7j6l396ecvmtjuitnlgnse3lae968m1h6iiac8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)**[?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9htd50djfc0h73o10jjtov7a0fsahq19efsfqbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqrhie0bpjl6f69u4eeu8l5p1q3j6h697r79cjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk4477u0ejcpvr8eshlgosn0c2efu372a6d8ret0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2fanv1ubop74407mfjg10rb3ilpcnm5s6dppnbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcmdnl5705sgu5p4ic8k6fb0tbklttdbs55e360g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z52bd0hgp94dkjqtlhs1ljeirb4kbd6m5p09lkpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6u1bp31t6riduv6h67buums3e06ij078t86bk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqstgqqof9pcmuqk9bd60ugrth4k3cui0i692p00_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqsvjq9qd90sr5hep0shv98ov35cgig041r2bi38_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zo78d7go0rtvggjd6m7e7sa7rtvd42ut2qe4nqp0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z724ofanhqsc3u726bhuv8md2og8g728722dtja8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h6aoj4c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3je51re7arstq2eupogdejfg9mlf8fia5aqm6t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h61o74c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t73elhbbc3ie6pn0phkmgprfcb3edj72orgclgrep9hmhqjad3gccqjfclkmljjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l6hjr5c36epib6oj7m2qmash5u)

**_CONFIDENTIAL TRUMP PATRIOT POLL_**
_WILL YOU JOIN TRUMP’S SOCIAL MEDIA?_

[** YES **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za6s21aqtjcb32uku2brcrkj264i9luea7kv8k5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h61o74c5h2bs)

[** NO **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zndtp6f02rs48c2ouidqq6vpl6417kam56lm19m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3h61o74c5h2bs)

Friend,

President Trump is WINNING.

name: Rand Paul
subject: WATCH: Fauci only wants hysteria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046375:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046375:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046375:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
__
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046375:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046376:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046377:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046378:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046379:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)
The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046375:JdLCNrENS:m:1:3253819041:64C47CBFB5220C37460EDA3556DFA5F8:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuk603oho0h52r0bbjivpcir32tkafvplblgk7ig_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3j64ob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zee9lsc79c7f5k0mekl56tu1eqvjskpi6bah5i3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3j64ob4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8t391hujals5n99gi63lm56cjkrifbvbk6s7978_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3j64ob4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

**This race is tight – I’m within 2 points of Marco Rubio in the polls – and on track to be the most expensive in history. That's why it's crucial you know I’m still $23,772 short of today's fundraising goal, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help me catch up:**

After CNN reported that Florida is a top pickup opportunity for Democrats, **Republicans began pouring more than $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to reelect Rubio. **
There's no denying that if I'm going overcome the GOP’s massive war chest, it’s going to take every single member of this grassroots team pitching in during critical moments like this one.
**Please, I’m counting on YOU to make your first donation and activate your Democratic membership before we hit election year, friend: [With the Senate majority on the line, will you ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39797751/321468288/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdjM2QwOS0wODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBEHIrtBFkA2WZZyY4Rb7qA3BUw5EF5VoxP-rGbK-ak=)****[rush $5 right now – or as much as you can spare – to help me reach my critical fundraising goal, defeat Marco Rubio and protect Senate control for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39797752/321468289/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdjM2QwOS0wODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBEHIrtBFkA2WZZyY4Rb7qA3BUw5EF5VoxP-rGbK-ak=)**
It means so much to me to have your support. Thank you.

– Congresswoman Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39797753/321468290/1581265324?refcode=jtk1830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdjM2QwOS0wODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBEHIrtBFkA2WZZyY4Rb7qA3BUw5EF5VoxP-rGbK-ak=) **Val Demings here:** I can't thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39797754/321468291/1804727444?refcode=jtk1830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdjM2QwOS0wODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBEHIrtBFkA2WZZyY4Rb7qA3BUw5EF5VoxP-rGbK-ak=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39797755/321468292/-460395862?refcode=jtk1830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDdjM2QwOS0wODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sBEHIrtBFkA2WZZyY4Rb7qA3BUw5EF5VoxP-rGbK-ak=&emci=e93d3824-9b5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9d7c3d09-0860-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

name: Dolan For Ohio
subject: #OhioFirst Week in Review
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc
body:
No images? [Click here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-e-bnlldt-idulfldlt-o/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-r/)
**#OhioFirst Week in Review **
December 17, 2021Matt and the #OhioFirst campaign team enjoyed a busy week on campaign trail visiting with fellow Republicans across Ohio. Unlike the rest of his opponents who are focused on issues outside of our state, Matt maintained his laser focus on Ohio and strengthening the Midwest region. The thoughts and prayers of all Ohioans and the nation are with our neighbors in Kentucky and others states in the aftermath of the horrific tornadoes. Matt took time this week to salute Dayton-based Ohio Task Force 1, one of the top Urban Search and Rescue Teams in the nation. They were deployed earlier this summer in the recovery efforts in Surfside, Florida. Now this week, they are [on their way to give aid to our neighbors in Kentucky](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-y/). Matt has noted repeatedly that faith and giving is the reason for the holiday season. He was in Cuyahoga County earlier this week for the North Royalton Republican Club's "Breakfast with Santa." The mood was festive, but the crowd was also intently focused on the importance of Republicans taking back control of Congress in 2022! Also this week, Matt expressed support for [Senator Marco Rubio's bill](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-j/) banning federal funds for any city allowing non-citizens to vote in American elections. Rubio introduced his bill after the Democrat-dominated New York City Council voted to allow non-citizens to vote in their elections. Matt said, "you're not an American citizen, you shouldn't be voting in American elections - period."In the middle of the week, Matt was in Lakewood for the Republican Party of Cuyahoga County's Christmas Party. He enjoyed talking to fellow Republicans about critical issues of importance to the economic vitality of the region and shared his enthusiasm for taking back Republican control of the U.S. Senate in 2022! Matt also returned to Painesville for the Lake County Republican Party Christmas Party. It's the same spot where Matt kicked off his #OhioMatters Tour this summer. In Matt's opinion, the best Christmas sweater distinction went to Casey, the son of Magistrate Elizabeth Tekavec! On December 15, Matt paid homage to Bill of Rights Day by pledging to vigilantly defend the Constitution every day. Unlike his opponents, Matt views the Constitution, states' rights and limited government as the bedrock of our nation. He said the "sacred document is never a matter of convenience and I will oppose any effort by any party to trample upon this lodestar of our Republic as well as the Founders' limits on government." Matt was in Medina for the Media County Republican Party Christmas Gala. The mood was festive, and Republicans were already fired up for the 2022 midterms! Lastly, holiday cheer was on full display in Dayton last night for the Montgomery County Republican Party's Christmas Party. Matt shared his congratulations with his Ohio Statehouse colleague and County Party Chairman Phil Plummer on a successful and well-attended event! We hope everyone enjoys a safe and relaxing weekend. Be on the lookout over the week ahead for more information on Matt's schedule in early 2022, along with [forthcoming #OhioMatters Town Hall events](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-t/) Hamilton, Washington and Lucas counties! -The Ohio First Team [Donate Here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-i/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-d/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-h/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-k/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bnlldt-idulfldlt-u/) | Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc. [Preferences](https://dolanforohioinc.updatemyprofile.com/y-bnlldt-FC066A9E-idulfldlt-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail19.com/t/y-u-bnlldt-idulfldlt-m/)
---

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8210%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QS9H8ejTWhMjUV4vnhxnOQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iRHn%2fH7naXxbaTm89I7Jmg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10070%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1YhMiG1%2fHYub5rQH2QEwBQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10070%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1YhMiG1%2fHYub5rQH2QEwBQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8210%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QS9H8ejTWhMjUV4vnhxnOQ&sysid=1)_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My friend, Tom Malinowski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Team,

With the last FEC deadline before 2022 coming up shortly, I wanted to reach out to you about my good friend and colleague, Tom Malinowski. [In a moment I’m going to ask you to support his campaign with a $10 donation – but first, I want to explain why.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805191/321487878/1474767726?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211218_1_1&refcode2=0ee765aa-1260-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU3NjVhYS0xMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nCKLx-aXU2y1bqC_rduYbH_cxr4MnNj8oLTKgAlINQ=)

**Tom’s election next year could very well determine who holds the House majority in 2022.** That’s why he’s quickly become one of the GOP’s top targets, and why they’ve already spent six figures on attack ads against him since early last summer. National Republicans are homed in on his district because they know what is at stake. We need to act accordingly.

We cannot allow Kevin McCarthy to take the Speaker's Gavel. We just can’t. All of our progress and President Biden’s progress over the course of this year is at stake. Infrastructure, pandemic relief, investments in our people. And so much more.

**All of this hinges on Congressional districts like Tom’s. We must ensure we defend his seat to defend our House majority.**

[I'm asking you today: Will you make a donation to Tom’s campaign to not only help him win his 2022 midterm election, but to help us hold onto our majority in Congress? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805192/321487879/1474767726?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211218_1_1&refcode2=0ee765aa-1260-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU3NjVhYS0xMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nCKLx-aXU2y1bqC_rduYbH_cxr4MnNj8oLTKgAlINQ=)
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_
[Donate $10 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805193/321487880/1474767726?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211218_1_1&refcode2=0ee765aa-1260-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU3NjVhYS0xMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nCKLx-aXU2y1bqC_rduYbH_cxr4MnNj8oLTKgAlINQ=)

[Donate $50 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805195/321487882/1474767726?amount=50&express_lane=true&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211218_1_1&refcode2=0ee765aa-1260-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU3NjVhYS0xMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nCKLx-aXU2y1bqC_rduYbH_cxr4MnNj8oLTKgAlINQ=)

[Donate Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805197/321487884/1474767726?amount=15&refcode2=0ee765aa-1260-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211218_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWU3NjVhYS0xMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nCKLx-aXU2y1bqC_rduYbH_cxr4MnNj8oLTKgAlINQ=)
Tom and his team are working overtime to ensure he wins re-election in 2022. But in order to increase programs like their organizing team, digital ads, and create a strong voter outreach program, they need your help. Your investment today can help them have the best chance to turn out voters and to hold Tom’s critical seat in Congress.

His team must be prepared. The GOP has been relentlessly attacking Tom for months, and those attacks are only going to become more vicious as we move into the new year. Trust me, I know how tough it is to stand up to these character smears.

There is so much at stake in the 2022 elections. That’s why we need to work together to re-elect Tom and prevent the GOP from undermining everything we’ve achieved.

National Republicans are homed in on his district because they know what is at stake. We need to act accordingly. We cannot allow Kevin McCarthy to take the Speaker's Gavel. We just can’t. All of our progress and President Biden’s progress over the course of this year is at stake. Infrastructure, pandemic relief, investments in our people. And so much more. All of this hinges on Congressional districts like Tom’s. We must ensure we defend his seat to defend our House majority. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = Tom and his team are working overtime to ensure he wins re-election in 2022. Hello,
I wanted to email you simply to say thank you.
After we fell just short of our mid-month fundraising goal, grassroots donors like you stepped up and chipped in to my campaign. Onward we go. We can keep this juggernaut going into the next quarter. Time to turn Iowa blue next November. Color me thankful.
As I travel around Iowa meeting with voters, it means a lot to know that people like you have my back. It’s how I can spend more time actually talking to voters -- and less time fundraising.
Plus, I’m not taking money from corporate PACs or special interests like my opponent Chuck Grassley, so if I’m going to take on Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs, a grassroots-funded campaign is the only way we’ll win.
I’ll admit it: Sometimes the days are long. I find myself in the car, finally heading home after having spent the entire day on the road, loosening a tie I tied some 14 hours before.
But talking with everyday Iowans about how we can expand access to health care to everyone, address the gun violence epidemic plaguing our communities, combat the extreme weather crisis, and restore and protect our democracy... well, those are the reasons I’m running for Senate.
I’m proud to have served our country across the globe for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I’d be even prouder to serve Iowa in the U.S. Senate.
Thank you for being a part of the team that will defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue next November.
Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.)

clean_body: This Christmas season, Tim is celebrating our Second Amendment right to self-defense with an AR-15 giveaway! | Peter, This Christmas season, Tim is celebrating our Second Amendment right to self-defense with an AR-15 giveaway! Tim wants us to share our own version of the 12 Days of Christmas with you. This one celebrates the right to bear arms and the right to self-defense. It’s a long song so we skipped to the end. We hope you enjoy it. On the 12th Day of Christmas, the Second Amendment gave to me- 12 Acquitting Jurors 11 Leftist Crying 10 Antifa Terrorists Leaping 9mm Ammo Casings 8 Cleaning Kits 7 Smith and Wessons 6 Shot Revolvers 5 Ammo Cans 4 Spare Clips 3 Gun Racks 2 Hundred Years of History And a chance to win an AR-15 Peter, Tim is giving away an AR-15 to celebrate the Christmas season and to celebrate American gun rights. Don’t forget to enter before it’s too late. When you donate, you will automatically be entered to win. If you are in the Christmas spirit, please donate to our campaign today. By donating you will be automatically entered into the giveaway. Have a Merry Christmas, Team Baxter | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: This will be the hardest legal battle we’ve ever fought...
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... [**So, can I count on you to stand up to Twitter and Senator Padilla by making a one-time donation of $20, $35, $50 or more today****?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! [_**So, I 'm asking you to join our critical fight today by rushing back your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 or more today to stop the silencing of conservatives.**_](pdf) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046586:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59046587:6x2YLrENX:m:1:3253819041:65F360AD3584F0F3A5D1AD9AC1DC6DD0:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Tom Perez
subject: The power of this team
body:
I'll level with you: December is going to be make-or-break for our campaign.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805736/321490931/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM3_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmY4ODEzOS0xMzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sB4frxo73bIEyQ5MUnZj9sbzfEXOykVs_7gGcx7qruY=)
**_[We're coming up on our FIRST public filing deadline of the campaign. Everyone from our opponents to pundits will be watching our numbers, so we can't fall short of _any_ of our fundraising goals this month. I'm asking for $7 to help us stay on track, demonstrate the strength of our campaign, and WIN this race, but first, let me explain what your support means to me. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805738/321490933/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM3_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmY4ODEzOS0xMzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sB4frxo73bIEyQ5MUnZj9sbzfEXOykVs_7gGcx7qruY=)_**

Team,
I was 12 years old when my dad died of a heart attack.

My family was lucky enough to have a community that came together to support us -- including my surrogate father, who was a Teamster. He taught me so much about what it means to come together, work hard, fight for working people, and uplift communities. **From then on, I was determined to devote my life to helping others and fighting for civil rights.**

I became a civil rights attorney in the Department of Justice and President Obama's Head of Civil Rights -- where I prosecuted high profile cases from white-supremacist hate crimes to police brutality and lauched a RECORD number of police misconduct cases.

I became president of the Montgomery County Council, Maryland Labor Secretary, and U.S. Labor Secretary where I helped pass the nation's first living wage law, fought for workers, and held predatory companies accountable.

**And now, I'm running for governor because I want to use my experience fighting injustice to build a better Maryland where opportunity and justice are equal for all. But it's going to take all of us to _win this fight:_**

**_[Please team, I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in $7 or whatever you can to WIN this race and build a Maryland that works for everyone? Flipping this governorship from red to blue will NOT be easy, and I can't do it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39805739/321490935/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM3_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmY4ODEzOS0xMzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sB4frxo73bIEyQ5MUnZj9sbzfEXOykVs_7gGcx7qruY=)_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

A lifetime fighting for civil rights has taught me a simple lesson: **We will never achieve our potential as a state until ALL of us have access to equal opportunity.**

For too many Marylanders, accessibility is determined at birth and affects everything from lifelong employment opportunities and access to housing to access to quality healthcare and the ability to build wealth to pass onto their children. **As your governor, I won’t let your destiny be determined by your zip code.**

This upcoming deadline is **critical --_[this filing demonstrates the strength of our campaign, and individual grassroots donors like you will make the difference. clean_body: I'll level with you: December is going to be make-or-break for our campaign. = = Team, I was 12 years old when my dad died of a heart attack. My family was lucky enough to have a community that came together to support us -- including my surrogate father, who was a Teamster. He taught me so much about what it means to come together, work hard, fight for working people, and uplift communities. From then on, I was determined to devote my life to helping others and fighting for civil rights. I became a civil rights attorney in the Department of Justice and President Obama's Head of Civil Rights -- where I prosecuted high profile cases from white-supremacist hate crimes to police brutality and lauched a RECORD number of police misconduct cases. I became president of the Montgomery County Council, Maryland Labor Secretary, and U.S. Labor Secretary where I helped pass the nation's first living wage law, fought for workers, and held predatory companies accountable. And now, I'm running for governor because I want to use my experience fighting injustice to build a better Maryland where opportunity and justice are equal for all. But it's going to take all of us to win this fight: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = A lifetime fighting for civil rights has taught me a simple lesson: We will never achieve our potential as a state until ALL of us have access to equal opportunity. For too many Marylanders, accessibility is determined at birth and affects everything from lifelong employment opportunities and access to housing to access to quality healthcare and the ability to build wealth to pass onto their children. As your governor, I won’t let your destiny be determined by your zip code. This upcoming deadline is critical --= Thank you so much for your support, Tom Perez ****=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

**It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin.** Gillian built her career on integrity, advocacy, and action, and she’s ready to put that skill set to work in the U.S. Senate! It's going to take all of us working together to defeat Ron Johnson to get her there, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39807713/321499350/-1884412140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjIxMjZkOS0xNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AIdrutCbbjVcWUEmM1Hi7CvKyYvqG1OfCcA9mjr82Q=&emci=6b2b8494-b65e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=362126d9-1660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813), or you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6b2b8494-b65e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/362126d9-1660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjIxMjZkOS0xNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AIdrutCbbjVcWUEmM1Hi7CvKyYvqG1OfCcA9mjr82Q=&id=128958426).
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39807720/321499357/256736469?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjIxMjZkOS0xNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AIdrutCbbjVcWUEmM1Hi7CvKyYvqG1OfCcA9mjr82Q=)
Dr. Gillian Battino has dedicated her life’s work to bettering the world and continues that commitment every day. Gillian spent 20+ years serving the people of Wisconsin and helping women in the fight against breast cancer. She has seen, up close and personal, the difference that access to quality health care can make. **[Will you make a donation to send Dr. Battino with her real-world experience and empathy to the United States Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39807726/321499365/256736469?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjIxMjZkOS0xNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AIdrutCbbjVcWUEmM1Hi7CvKyYvqG1OfCcA9mjr82Q=)**

clean_body: | = Peter — We send a lot of fundraising emails. No doubt about it. So we thought it was important to take a moment to explain why these messages mean so much to Mark Kelly’s re-election. Almost 200,000 people have contributed to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign so far. At this point in our campaign, the average donor has made 2 donations. Some people make more, some people make less. But we’ve obviously sent a lot more than 2 emails. The reality is that if everyone who received this email contributed $3 today, we’d reach our fundraising goals for the entire year before midnight. But we know that won’t happen — not everyone gives. So that makes it especially important that you chip in when you can. And today’s a big day, cause we’re well short of our end-of-the-year goals. So we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = 99% of our donations come online, and the single greatest source of those are in response to emails like this one. name: Hoan Huynh
subject: More than 9,000 Anti-Asian Reported Incidents since Pandemic! We Need Action Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Hoan
body:
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/volunteer-email-header-team-hoan.png]Hi Peter,
This week was tough. We attended a vigil for Woom Sing Tse, a father, husband, and beloved member of our AAPI community, right here in Chicago, who was shot 22 times in a senseless act of gun violence and anti-Asian hate. 22 times. 22 times in broad daylight at 12:30PM , across the street from an elementary school when kids were in class.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/vigil_photo.png]2 weeks ago, another member of our community, Rae Park, was shot and killed in an attempted carjacking at gunpoint at 7AM in the morning while heading to work. A 24-year-old University of Chicago student, Dennis Zheng, was shot and killed for his laptop and cell phone, which was later pawned for $100.
And just this past weekend, Suraj Mahadeva, a 26-year-old young adult, was shot and killed while standing on the porch of a friend's home. More than 9,000 Anti-Asian incidents have been reported since this pandemic started , and there are countless more that have gone unreported.
This is unacceptable! We cannot go on living like this. Our elected officials have failed us. I have met countless neighbors who have told me they're deeply afraid right now for their public safety. That they no longer feel safe in a city that they call home.
We must do better. We need to ensure the public safety of all of our children, our neighbors, and our families. We cannot have our kids dying on our streets, and our family members and neighbors gunned down. It is a moral imperative that we fight to end gun violence in our communities.
Enough is enough! Ending gun violence and protecting our families is a key priority for me. I have spent my life working in community investments , investing in solutions to reduce gun violence in our cities, working with community organizations, community leaders, community policing, and folks at the frontlines to reduce gun violence and invest in holistic and innovative solutions to make sure our communities are safe and are able to access opportunities.
We need to introduce new strategies and ensure the public safety of our families and kids. If elected, I will do whatever it takes to make sure we build forward a safer future for all of us.
We cannot wait any longer. This is the time to do so. We must do so. Please help us get our message out to more voters in our communities and help elect the first Vietnamese-Chinese American to Congress from the great state of Illinois to fight to end gun violence.
Chip in $49 Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hoan_website]Chip in $49 today to help us reach more voters and fight to end gun violence in our communities!
Thank you so much!
In Solidarity,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89231/images/Hoan%20Sig.JPG]Hoan Huynh
Democrat for Congress IL-05
https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/hoanforcongress] https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh [https://twitter.com/HoanDHuynh] https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/ [https://instagram.com/hoandhuynh/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/hoan-for-congress/]
Paid for by Citizens for Hoan
Citizens for Hoan
PO Box 408158
Chicago, IL 60640
United States

Team, Earlier this week, we celebrated a slate of 22 new endorsers for our campaign to elect Ben as governor. These endorsements signify an important shift in our campaign: it’s proof that our hard work is paying off. A growing number of people are coming on board to support our broad, determined coalition of folks from every corner of the Commonwealth ready to take on the status quo and usher in a new era of leadership for our state. Rep. Paul Mark from the Second Berkshire echoed what the rest of us know, **“Ben has the vision we need to move Massachusetts forward as Governor.”** We saw a surge in grassroots donations just after Monday’s endorsement announcement, but in the days following, we saw a slowdown in fundraising at a time when we need to be shoring up our resources for 2022. **We’re reaching out to ask: will you help us kick our momentum back up ahead of our upcoming End-of-Year fundraising deadline on December 31? name: Beach-Ferrara HQ
subject: Jasmine would be Madison Cawthorn’s Congresswoman if elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39809133/321507390/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGUwMzk5OS0xYjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVAkesRk_OQ0GLNCYAXhnU2tbec2UWyxM9CTyE7IclI=)

| | Peter, Can you take a guess at the _last_ person Madison Cawthorn would want representing him in Western North Carolina and Congress? If you didn’t know, the answer is **Jasmine Beach-Ferrara**. Here would be a gay woman, Christian minister, mom of three, and county commissioner representing one of the most extreme Republicans in Congress. That’s all the more reason that we should help get her elected. [**Jasmine is a believer in democracy, an advocate for equality, and a climate champion – all things that Cawthorn is not. body:
#
Friend,
Last week, I joined my colleagues on Capitol Hill to call on the Senate to deliver a permanent pathway to citizenship for immigrants in the _Build Back Better Act_ – and to overrule the advisory opinion of the Senate parliamentarian.
In November, the House passed this historic bill, which includes provisions that will improve the lives of so many Americans — but it currently only provides temporary relief for undocumented immigrants, and even those modest provisions are in doubt based on the parliamentarian’s ruling yesterday.
**[Immigrants deserve to be recognized and treated with dignity and need to be prioritized in our relief efforts. Sign on today to call on the Senate to disregard the unelected parliamentarian and deliver a permanent pathway to citizenship.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39809322/321507871/299844582?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE3MDNjYy0xYjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lP1NQEMekN1a6-4SmJxfrl0foL9g01l-LW-hNbRlbIg=&emci=c9a9e4c5-475f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4f1703cc-1b60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24719896)**

Dreamers, Temporary Protected Status holders, and millions of essential immigrant workers enrich our communities and have earned protection from threats of deportation.
For decades, Democrats have promised to deliver bold immigration reform — and right now is our moment to follow through and provide immigrant communities with the opportunity to succeed.
**[Before the Senate passes the _Build Back Better Act_ , we need to ensure a permanent pathway to citizenship is in the bill. Team, please join me in calling on the Senate to add permanent protections for immigrants.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39809324/321507873/299844582?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE3MDNjYy0xYjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lP1NQEMekN1a6-4SmJxfrl0foL9g01l-LW-hNbRlbIg=&emci=c9a9e4c5-475f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4f1703cc-1b60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24719896)**

clean_body: Friend, Last week, I joined my colleagues on Capitol Hill to call on the Senate to deliver a permanent pathway to citizenship for immigrants in the Build Back Better Act – and to overrule the advisory opinion of the Senate parliamentarian. In November, the House passed this historic bill, which includes provisions that will improve the lives of so many Americans — but it currently only provides temporary relief for undocumented immigrants, and even those modest provisions are in doubt based on the parliamentarian’s ruling yesterday. Dreamers, Temporary Protected Status holders, and millions of essential immigrant workers enrich our communities and have earned protection from threats of deportation. For decades, Democrats have promised to deliver bold immigration reform — and right now is our moment to follow through and provide immigrant communities with the opportunity to succeed. As we get closer to getting this bill signed into law, I hope the Senate will deliver and ensure none of our friends, families, and neighbors are left behind. This is the right thing to do, and securing immigrants’ pathway to citizenship is also critical to America’s rich and innovative culture and economic success. Onwards, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zusa4ggam3e9k0skcnc8k2gpgnolcfkj0g7c8k9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfb4flpfriuqv03l2dp64p19v5f9niqqskcq9gig_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6aq1dka19lo89a8furfikoova112tp602qjl58o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zihll6upfd2cm5vc1g5ir5dv8r6e5vvg10c0ndh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zij56inq091hu2eqbrikjne02jhmj4sk7enfkl90_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuc6m45q4hlo5qgd5o77okescip73rqkq0lonec0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdf7ndbmt89qdiffgonf6r8lkcpnq6o3c40kvmjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4b0pn27p8it2km8mrm3l99tnn3uiqq428v35sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8f9f3o082vu5qtmels1b3c0ddcv1rvv2v2eci38_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3gmcob7clh2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: URGENT – only have a couple of minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby again. I don't have much time – but I wanted to reach out to you quickly and say thank you for your support over the last several months as we work to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R). I've been reflecting on the past year and I'm struck by how much we've accomplished.
Thanks to people like you believing in my campaign, we've created unprecedented grassroots momentum to flip this seat blue. Now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-high disapproval ratings, and even Iowa's most famous pollster is pointing to real "weakness" in his polling numbers. We've never been closer to defeating him and winning real leadership for working families like my own.
So sincerely, Peter, thank you so, so much for believing in me and this campaign.
But we're not across the finish line yet. As of the latest finance reports, the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has nearly $30 million in the bank to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and take back the Senate. That's a lot to compete against, but as someone who has won an election against a man double my age and flipped a House seat from red to blue, I'm not one to back down from a challenge. But we've got to keep up our grassroots momentum and ensure we have the resources to compete and _win._
So that's why I've got to ask again – especially ahead of our last public FEC reporting deadline of the year: Can you make your first $5 donation to my campaign to help me defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and protect our Senate majority? Every dollar helps and each donation really means so much to me. Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39811248/321517838/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk485-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBhMmIyYi0yMjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Qlv5y-6ILrNqYWR7e7ksM63Z3tWUw9H0e75aVx83Uk=)**
With so much gratitude for all that you do,

– Abby

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Help me retire this RINO
