body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341014:WOI9sGHNA:m:1:2365227053:E56C34F0CA1F0F70664BB0C75BAF456F:r)

Dear Peter,

**One of RINO Peter Meijer 's first acts in Congress was voting to impeach President Trump.**

Meijer chose to receive accolades from the fake news media and D.C. swamp over the constitution and conservatives.

That's why I'm running for Congress with Donald Trump's endorsement to make sure RINO Peter Meijer's first term in Congress is his last.

**[Will you join Donald Trump in supporting my campaign to retire RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341014:WOI9sGHNA:m:1:2365227053:E56C34F0CA1F0F70664BB0C75BAF456F:r)?**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341014:WOI9sGHNA:m:1:2365227053:E56C34F0CA1F0F70664BB0C75BAF456F:r)

You can look up my name.

**I 've been slandered and attacked by CNN and the fake news media ever since I served in the Trump administration.**

I fought day and night for Donald Trump's agenda working for Dr. Ben Carson.

President Trump appointed me to the 1776 Commission to push back against the racist lies critical race theory brainwashes children to think America is an evil and bigoted country.

_I knew that fighting for our values wouldn 't win any popularity contests_.

But RINO Peter Meijer chose the easy path of swimming with the currents of the D.C. swamp.
[_**CHIP IN TO HELP JOHN GIBBS DEFEAT RINO PETER MEIJER**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341014:WOI9sGHNA:m:1:2365227053:E56C34F0CA1F0F70664BB0C75BAF456F:r) Too many Republicans in Congress fall for the temptation of selling out their voters and their values to win praise in the fake news media.

RINOs like Peter Meijer want a smooth and stable existence and not ruffle any feathers.

**Not me.**

I say shake it up.

President Trump trusted me to fight for his America First policies, and now President Trump trusts me to fight for his agenda in Congress by endorsing my campaign.

_That trust stands in stark contrast to my opponent_.

Nancy Pelosi knows she can trust RINO Peter Meijer to vote with socialist Democrats when the chips are down.

**[So please join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59341014:WOI9sGHNA:m:1:2365227053:E56C34F0CA1F0F70664BB0C75BAF456F:r).**

Sincerely,
John Gibbs

body:
Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state of 2022
#

Hey,
We know you've been getting a lot of emails from us, and we’d like to take a minute to explain why we send them.
**This isn't any ordinary race.** Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state of 2022. It’s Democrats’ best chance to defend our razor-thin Senate majority.
**Malcolm isn't an ordinary candidate.** He's a working person who knows what it's like to wait in line at a food bank, suffer the weight of student debt, and work a minimum wage job.
**This is an extraordinary moment.** It's time for working people to have a seat at the table — to ensure our government works for us.
But it's going to take all of us coming together to elect Malcolm to be the champion working families need in the U.S. Senate. That's where you come in.
We've got an important FEC fundraising deadline at the end of this month, and we need a groundswell of contributions from supporters like you to stay competitive, win the nomination, and flip this seat blue. So we're asking:
[Can you rush in a contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for U.S. Senate today? name: CollierForTexas.com
subject: SIGN YOUR NAME: Climate action cannot wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
If anyone still needs convincing that climate change is real, they should come to Texas. From the Gulf Coast to North Texas, streets are flooding, farmers and ranchers are experiencing disruption in crop productivity, and high winds are causing power outages. In order to save our planet and our state, we need bold climate action that tackles the issue head-on and invests in the infrastructure that will save lives and livelihoods. But so far, leaders like Dan Patrick have outright denied the science of climate change. **Let’s be clear: climate change is no longer an issue for the future — it is a challenge for the here and now.** The truth is, we can implement sustainable solutions that will prepare our state for natural disasters and save lives and livelihoods. **We can protect the Gulf Coast. We can protect our wetlands and estuaries. We can protect our coastal economies. And we can create millions of high-paying jobs all across the Lone Star State.** Mike will fight to build the Ike Dike, invest in water infrastructure, and fix the damn grid for the future. But right now, state leaders like Dan Patrick care more about protecting corporate profits than the future of our great state and its people. [**Texas cannot wait for action ten or so years down the line. Sign your name if you’re committed to the fight against climate change and create the jobs of the future right here in Texas >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812483/321524295/-866491578?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnFgxFInkx2qUa7Itb5xIBB_7PxiM8Za4EIsFx0Z2II=&emci=551b9813-525f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=08b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812484/321524296/-866491578?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mnFgxFInkx2qUa7Itb5xIBB_7PxiM8Za4EIsFx0Z2II=&emci=551b9813-525f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=08b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7689298)

subject: Poll closes at 11:59 PM!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Answer missing: | **_RESPONSE NEEDED BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT_** | **⚠️ ⚠️TEAM WEST LIVE POLL ⚠️ ⚠️** **Do you believe Congress needs leaders who understand the vital importance of DeFi, blockchain technologies, and cryptocurrency in our modern-day economy?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812488/321524301/1209523043?refcode=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSH8ARPdoWwNKhPwZOshy0W7Aj4g6hH4tolkQc8ku0A=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812489/321524302/1209523043?refcode=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSH8ARPdoWwNKhPwZOshy0W7Aj4g6hH4tolkQc8ku0A=)
---|---
_Your response will be instantly recorded._
Team,
As we have all adjusted to new ways of working in light of COVID, we have seen the beginnings of what the economy of the future can look like. It’s clear to Matt that blockchain technologies, cryptocurrency included, can be an integral part of our economic future.
From novel methods of proof-of-ownership to banking the unbanked, crypto is at the forefront of our increasingly-digital lives. And even though most people agree that in the future effectively all of our currency is going to be in a digital format, big banks are trying their _hardest_ to stop the inevitable.
That’s because our traditional banking system allows banks to profit off everyday people when they make and receive payments, buy houses and start businesses — while emerging digital currencies allow everyday people to bypass banks and intermediaries completely.
It’s clear that big banks aren’t ready to **give up their power**.
The American Bankers Association, which represents the largest U.S. banks, spoke to the House Financial Services Committee about the _**negative consequences**_ of the Federal Reserve exploring its own digital currency.
Friend, we NEED members of Congress who understand the _**positive potential**_ that this technology has. We need people in our corner who understand that cryptocurrency is an emerging technology, developing and improving at lightning speeds, and requires a careful and skilled hand in crafting regulations and laws surrounding it.
**Matt West is the first congressional candidate with development experience in DeFi, and a leader we can count on to address these issues and more.**
But we want to know if you agree with us, friend. So before midnight, please respond:
**Do you believe Congress needs leaders who understand the vital importance of DeFi, blockchain technologies, and cryptocurrency in our modern-day economy?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812490/321524303/1209523043?refcode=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSH8ARPdoWwNKhPwZOshy0W7Aj4g6hH4tolkQc8ku0A=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39812491/321524304/1209523043?refcode=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.02b62716-2660-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2MjcxNi0yNjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSH8ARPdoWwNKhPwZOshy0W7Aj4g6hH4tolkQc8ku0A=)

Team West

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Democrats’ biggest obstacle
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, The biggest obstacle to voting rights, pro-democracy bills, reproductive freedom, campaign finance reform, and more is the filibuster. Mitch McConnell continues to weaponize this archaic rule, which appears nowhere in the Constitution but has been cynically used to block civil rights legislation for decades, and to dictate the Senate’s agenda from the minority. Even though Democrats possess a 5-seat majority in the House and a single vote advantage in the Senate, it’s practically impossible to pass any number of crucial bills through regular order. Passing the President’s Build Back Better agenda through budget reconciliation is our one shot at universal pre-K, climate action, lower prescription drug costs, and more because it doesn’t require a 60-vote majority. Or in other words, it doesn’t require Mitch McConnell. It’s the same way we passed the _American Rescue Plan Act_ in March, which created the expanded Child Tax Credit, postponed the eviction moratorium, extended increased unemployment payments, and distributed hundreds of millions of vaccines. **Let’s not forget — not a single Republican voted for this bill even though it provided critical relief after months of hardship and instability due to the pandemic. They don’t care.** Without the budget reconciliation process, the _American Rescue Plan Act_ and the _Build Back Better Act_ would both be in Mitch McConnell’s legislative graveyard right now. President Biden’s agenda would be in tatters, and America hurting. But we can’t use the reconciliation process for most legislation, and so any number of critical national priorities merely languish without action. And our people suffer the results. If the filibuster was preventing Republicans from enacting their agenda, they would have abolished it immediately. We can’t wait any longer. It’s time to act. [**Add your name to my petition declaring your support for abolishing the filibuster. We need to show the GOP that the majority of Americans don’t believe in this backward Senate rule — not even a law — that has ground the Senate nearly to a halt.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39813055/321526898/4366001?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjU5YzQ2Yi0yODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqCa9mzerRN7ivYfw7VjL-VCz1__e9SVSr_5DSu-Gv4=&emci=4dff1aec-cf4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=af59c46b-2860-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=33917617) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39813056/321526899/4366001?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjU5YzQ2Yi0yODYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UqCa9mzerRN7ivYfw7VjL-VCz1__e9SVSr_5DSu-Gv4=&emci=4dff1aec-cf4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=af59c46b-2860-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=33917617)
---
At this point in our history, the filibuster plays no constructive role. And with our democracy on the line, abolishing it is the only way forward. I believe that together, we can defend our democracy and create a better future for generations to come.
Thank you for making your voice heard.
— Adam
Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
---

Burbank, CA 91502
United States

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za1tllf6gvrm6kaca2u9e6bm9mnkb1urcr6vh3l8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq75c3ic2qb9ormegq3cpj3msrj0o3lcmomctb6e1pj2o33mipm4sthepo69d3gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbad30e8o6cdb4mmoefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpie1pb0c5im8oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs1r11a6d6mlckoahrep626vkbg9noraarfdie70_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3im0ob5chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9vjv186rl1t4u3ii3500q3f68dh4opk53q4n3g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3im0ob5chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9aquo154l0q4t0kds6ds4sssak4j5ngrnihkafo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3im0ob5chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Four races that will decide the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Hi friends, Thanks to our Democratic majority in the Senate, we've been able to pass critical legislation that invests in our nation's infrastructure, provides economic relief to the American people, and expands access to health care -- just to name a few. But CNN is reporting that the 2022 election will be an “uphill battle” for Democrats to keep the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell is targeting the four key seats that are most likely to flip to the GOP: Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Reverend Raphael Warnock in Georgia, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and our race in New Hampshire. Losing even one seat in 2022 means losing the Senate. **National GOP groups and far-right megadonors have spent tens of millions of dollars attacking us, and there are millions more on the way as part of their plan to take back the Senate.** With control of the Senate hinging on these four races and our biggest FEC deadline of the year just around the corner, we can't afford to fall short. That's why we're launching a massive “Protect our Senate Majority” fundraising push to defend the four most vulnerable Democrats. **[Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Senator Warnock's in Georgia, Senator Kelly's in Arizona, and Senator Cortez Masto’s in Nevada before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39814257/321532481/-1090171612?refcode=e20211218_core4&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWVlOWJiMy0yZjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S59kYCI3DV4JtMgKyhHE1GEnaU58SZyKyeF4IwB6Gxw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39814258/321532482/-1090171612?refcode=e20211218_core4&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWVlOWJiMy0yZjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S59kYCI3DV4JtMgKyhHE1GEnaU58SZyKyeF4IwB6Gxw=)

Maggie Hassan

name: Herschel Walker
subject: virtually tied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050987:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)

---
Peter - here's some polling that came out earlier this year:

**GEORGIA SENATE RACE
Warnock 48% - Walker 46%**
**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

**[We need your help, Peter, so we can pick up the momentum, win this race, and help Republicans win back the Senate majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050987:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)**

The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report.

[**Give $3 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050988:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)
[**Give $5 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050989:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)

[**Give _More_ ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050987:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)
Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short.

This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum **[if 338 more donors step up to give BEFORE MIDNIGHT!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050987:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)**

Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59050987:J6yCbrEqN:m:1:3298722022:9DF9D85B9B1EE0CBFC2AB50405EDBE06:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for U.S. Senate

body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a staple of American life and an essential public service we all rely on. Its necessity goes beyond delivering holiday gifts and cards – the USPS delivers lifesaving prescriptions, groceries, even paychecks. But this service took a massive hit during the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be Postmaster General.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and mail-in ballots.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – right before the holidays.**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. **But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please friend, tell us now:**

Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Will You Help Us Change America for the Better in 2022?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132166?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**It __really is__ possible to turn the progressive tide that threatens to engulf America.** But our movement is going to need the support of every like-minded American to do it!

Over the past year, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has helped move the dial in our state:
* **Combating Critical Race Theory** **–** [Our report](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=516b96462f&e=5703353baa) did not just show what is being taught, we published a bill to deal with the problem, which we sent to every member of the legislature.
* **Heritage Foundation event** **–** We partnered with Heritage to hold an event to look in detail at how to respond to Critical Race Theory.
* **Fat Cat report** **–** [Our report](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b48ebdc415&e=5703353baa) exposed how certain bureaucrats spend too much public money on their own salaries.

This coming year, we have a clear plan: the **Freedom Agenda for Mississippi.** This consists of 12 specific reforms that we are aiming for, which would lift up our state, safeguarding liberty and promoting limited government:
1. A law to**combat Critical Race Theory.**
2. A bill to **ensure Academic Transparency** so folk know what their children are being taught.
3. A bill to **protect free speech on campus (aka the Forum Act).**
4. **Allow** **Open School Enrolment** so that moms & dads have a choice over where their children go to school.
5. A bill to**cap School Board administration costs.**
6. **Establish multiple Charter School Authorizers** so we get more Charter Schools.
7. **Abolish the State Income Tax.**
8. **Cut Red Tape** with a one-in-two-out law.
9. **Repeal the Certificate of Need laws** that hold back our healthcare sector and push prices up.
10. **End the moratorium on Home Health Agencies.**
11. A bill to allow Mississippians to make more use of**telemedicine services.**
12. A**"sandbox bill" **to encourage tech innovation.

**_If you had a good year in 2021, please help us achieve lasting change in 2022!_**

**As a not-for-profit, we depend on support from individuals like you. Please click on the button below to make a gift of $50, $100, $1,000 or more.**
---
| [DONATE TO CHANGE AMERICA](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4adfbd0938&e=5703353baa "DONATE TO CHANGE AMERICA")
---
| Alternatively, if you had a good year with investments, you might want to consider a stock transfer gift? Let me know if you would like to know more about that as an option.

A recent arrival in America, I know what an extraordinary country this is. America is the most successful nation of earth because she has more liberty and freedom than almost any place else. We need your help to ensure that America stays that way in 2022! With your support we can win this fight.

Have a wonderful Christmas and I look forward to updating you on our progress in the New Year!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Ps. Did you know that the Mississippi Center for Public Policy helped draft the 2018 law that led directly to the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ that is currently before the Supreme Court? This could overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , and it shows that a state-based think tank like ours really can make a major difference...
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2426562598) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2426562598).

_Copyright © 2021 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Unlike Marjorie Taylor Greene, I will always put country over party.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene and her QAnon buddies have tried to hide their vile, bigoted beliefs under the guise of “patriotism.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39814406/321533186/-368420542?refcode=20211218_CGVA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzMxMTAwNi0yZjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=niQ9ynUm8ze_P0NxHDkky2oIBGbiMzXcizxjSxHZ5h4=)
---

| | Derek, Marjorie Taylor Greene and her QAnon buddies have tried to hide their vile, bigoted beliefs under the guise of “patriotism” - but as someone who proudly joined the U.S. Army at 18, let me tell you something: Marjorie Taylor Greene is no patriot. During my time in the service, I worked beside folks of all walks of life and from all political backgrounds and viewpoints. Only our top Trump Patriots have been invited to enter, _but your reservation has not been confirmed. _

**[Be sure to chip in ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to confirm your entry to have dinner with President Trump!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33m6j-1pvif-4qqlpo2/ "Be sure to chip in ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to confirm your entry to have dinner with President Trump!")**

GOP Dinner Reservation Team

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-33m6j-1pvii-4qqlpo5/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not
increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter
without making a contribution, click here. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, December
1st, 2021, at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Wednesday, January 5th, 2022 at
11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST January
5th, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at
the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event
location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one
(1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Palm Beach, FL hotels, with an approximate retail
value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump
Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the
discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate
retail value of the prize is $1,400. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries
received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders)
of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the
District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of maturity as determined by
state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they
are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is Elise for Congress, PO Box 500, Glens Falls, NY 12801.

## [Theresa’s Diner Tour: Fundraiser w/ LCHS + Dad](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2021/12/18/theresas-diner-tour-fundraiser-w-lchs-dad/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
You're Invited! Next stop on the [#TheresaDinerTour](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/theresadinertour?__eep__=6&__cft__%5B0%5D=AZVo8kDvL-ItmIukgzDKYgdr-SskCM4E7vYJ-BDnXHhvECxoVNdwtqVtmt69hpfC5R6e7SgNWJEjxAU--Y2REMUnSztpzHGncueW5CNYCEgdSQ&__tn__=q)! Theresa Ellis is lucky to have Gary, her Dad, plus Joan Weber Wurster and Lori Hauck Irvin, her Lancaster Catholic High School (LCHS) friends, host a holiday fundraiser for her U.S. Congress campaign.As a graduate of LCHS, Theresa (Terry Schmalhofer) Ellis, attended Millersville University, graduated George Mason University and was later awarded Alum of the Year. Theresa is excited to go back to a high school/college hangout, that is still a local eating spot for friends and her Dad. Join us to visit with friends and support Theresa for U.S. Congress!
Theresa is an elected City Councilwoman who built a small management business, worked as a healthcare professional manager, and raised her 6 daughters and 1 son beginning in Lancaster and later moving to Manassas, Virginia.She and husband George are military parents with one of her daughters who served and her son who is active. She lives in Va. and is running for the NEW 7th District but loves to visit to see her Dad and family.
Please contribute to Theresa who is fundraising with friends and family, and supporters to win a seat in Washington DC to represent all the people she cares about in the country!
Share with your network! Contribute TODAY and dessert is on us! [https://www.TheresaEllisforCouncil.com/Contribute](https://www.theresaellisforcouncil.com/Contribute?fbclid=IwAR2sBcAbYDrXvLD1sdagRj5PE5aa5Ta6jpaYL7jTApSzYq4w7h_kMIJr7yw)

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Why I’m in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
I owe it to the women and women of color before me, who inspired me, and inspired me to see myself in politics.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211218-463-footer-ak&t=2&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)
Good morning, it’s Morgan. I wanted to take a moment today to share a little bit about what inspired me to be in this race.
For years, I followed politics and observed politicians with an intrigued but somewhat disappointed eye, and I think a lot of folks can relate to this. I was frustrated with the lack of movement on key issues that I cared about and were affecting me, my family, and my community.
**It seemed like no matter who had the majority, political leaders were in constant deadlock and nothing was getting done.** I would watch politicians on TV, listen to their speeches, see their interviews and I didn’t feel inspired. I was looking for role models, and folks I could relate to, but they were shockingly absent.
**UNTIL:** I saw Ayanna Pressley was running. She was a totally different kind of person then the typical corporate-backed career politician and she openly rejected the establishment. She made it work and _won_. Her fierceness, and fearlessness were key in making me see myself in this work.
**THEN:** I saw folks like Lauren Underwood win without being a part of the D.C. establishment. Seeing the way that women and women of color were putting themselves out there and going for it in politics showed me that I not only could but should do the same.
**I got my start fighting back against corrupt corporations and organizing for a better Ohio.** My love for my community continues to guide me and it’s what still motivates me to keep going (even in blizzards like this one 😉❄️).
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18452?t=3&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)
So thank you. Thanks for being with me in this fight and on this journey. I know it may seem like an impossibly uphill battle, but when I look at the leadership, drive, and passion of the women of color who came before me, I know that _this is possible_. If we all come together, we can really flip this state blue and make the Ohio of our dreams a reality.
Thank you for hearing my story,
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18452?t=4&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)
Morgan for U.S. Senate in Ohio
Morgan Harper is an Ohio native and unapologetically progressive lawyer, activist, and community organizer. She is fighting against the far-right and the corporate elite in a campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. 2022 is a critical election year, where we can create an Ohio that works for the everyday working person, who’s been cast aside in the name of corporate interests. Our campaign does not take fossil fuel, corporate, or super PAC donations. [**_Please support Morgan Harper today by donating anything you can to our grassroots movement._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18452?t=5&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)**
****[Donate Now »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18452?t=6&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)**
---
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211218-463-footer&t=7&refcode2=463_90090_1V5LNW&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=463%2E90090%2E1V5LNW)

Folks —
Our quarterly fundraising deadline at the end of this month will tell a story about our campaign.
Hopefully, it will show our opponents the progress we’ve made, how viable our campaign is, and that **we’re in this race to win it.**
But, if we don’t raise what we need ahead of the deadline, our fundraising numbers won’t show any of those things. We can’t afford to come up short, so **my team and I have created our last – and most important – goal for this year.**
**We need to raise $30,000 before our quarterly deadline.**
[_**Will you chip in to help my campaign reach our end-of-quarter goal for 2021?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815645/321539486/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211218_FR_EOQ1_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmE5MjUwNC0zYjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vYv_nUoLQaNZTYeGY5MxswW4fgWwyfKllk_dAR2_2R0=)

Look, I know this goal may seem big. But, rest assured, it is _not_ unreachable.
This is _exactly_ the amount that our campaign needs to fight back against the far-right radical agenda that has persisted in the Republican Party. And with there now being four opponents lined up against me,**I need your help more than ever!**
**We have to reach our $30,000 goal if we want to hit the ground running** on Day One of the new year. _Are you in to help us hold on to the most competitive House district in the country?_
[_**Can you chip in to reach my campaign’s end-of-quarter goal? name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Crime - We are more unsafe than ever before
body:
Help me tackle rising crime
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-4IRXJmc5Se-fTtPFoUmfZzro5ETpZoF92M2xKH12pQvZzrTwZIop_LUR5vLJ_qBprMcY4IVjCqVjjYjY7xxtPXm-TRW-JKQO9-vffte_Ky6wmVIlNwvpfnN2B9XUVH8DDzncD-hAg72TRU7YVK1UrjwRBCw1KI_&c=mVymhz4Cfq5czGOQIP-oI6_hGZIZMbxFn-P3xHONuvqj_J_ny2BEfQ==&ch=QuxtzlHcswu3Bk_xAdd9dOmfHbP5IFmkHIuIWdnIanPuGBJny_ZqBw==)
---
|
---
|
# Feeling unsafe? You're not alone
---
It's not rocket science.
You can't defund the police, reduce or eliminate bail, and allow liberal prosecutors to put criminals back on the streets without seeing a spike in crime. I want to see real solutions brought forth at every level of government to address crime, and to ensure rule of law is sustained. Good people should never live in fear in this country.
Last week, the Common Sense Institute issued a report showing drastic statistics that you may already feel (I have friends in Denver who are fearful whereas they never were before).
Among key findings:
* Average monthly crime rate in 2021 is 28% higher than it was in 2011, and 15% higher than it was only two years ago in 2019.
* Colorado had the highest increase in its property crime rate between 2011 and 2020, among all states.
* Colorado's violent crime rate in 2020 is 35% higher than 2011; nationally the rate grew only 3%.
* The 2020 murder rate is 106% higher than in 2011. The rape rate is 9% higher, with assault up 40%.
* Significant increases in organized retail crime and motor vehicle thefts contributed between $1.2 and $1.6 billion to total costs. * Colorado had the highest motor vehicle theft rate among all states in 2020.
Law enforcement--our local police and sheriffs--must have the support they need to address this rising tide of criminality. The federal government has provided funding for states to mitigate the impacts of the pandemic. I want to see these funds go toward bolstering our police forces and providing support for these frontline officers who are willing to risk it all to protect and serve.
Additionally, we must reform our judicial system. We cannot have dangerous criminals out on low or no bail, especially repeat offenders. It goes without saying that we must also secure our borders to prevent criminal elements from exploiting their current porosity.
However, I cannot do this without your help. Please consider a donation right now so that I can go to Washington and effect change. Our nation is dependent upon those who will represent practical solutions to evolving problems. Join me in standing up by giving me your support.

name: Team Tom
subject: Tom wanted to make sure you saw this message
body:
I'll level with you: December is going to be make-or-break for our campaign.

Hey,

Hate to bug you so late, but we wanted to make sure you saw Tom’s heartfelt note about his dad. Tom's spent his life in service to others, and he wants nothing more than to serve Maryland families as Governor, but we won't get there without your help.

**Right now, we're 9 hours away from our mid-month deadline with 28 contributions needed to close the gap and stay on track toward our December goal.**

We can’t stress enough just how important it is that we not fall behind this month – December is our final full month to fundraise before we file publicly for the first time. All eyes are going to be on our numbers, and **we can’t afford to fall short and risk vulnerability in a primary this crowded.**

_**[If you can, please chip in $7 to make sure we stay on track toward our December goal and demonstrate the power of this campaign. It truly is make-or-break.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815886/321542775/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM4_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gNSX6aOLERmLH0PlQRoRA4BZC6cIER8Br-sjcCNrVI=)**_

Every dollar donated gives us the resources to sustain a winning campaign. Thank you for stepping up, believing in Tom, and investing in a brighter, more equitable future for Maryland families.

– Team Tom
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tom Perez
Date: December 18, 2021
Subject: The power of this team

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815887/321542776/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM4_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gNSX6aOLERmLH0PlQRoRA4BZC6cIER8Br-sjcCNrVI=)
**_[We're coming up on our FIRST public filing deadline of the campaign. Everyone from our opponents to pundits will be watching our numbers, so we can't fall short of _any_ of our fundraising goals this month. I'm asking for $7 to help us stay on track, demonstrate the strength of our campaign, and WIN this race, but first, let me explain what your support means to me. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815888/321542777/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM4_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gNSX6aOLERmLH0PlQRoRA4BZC6cIER8Br-sjcCNrVI=)_**

Team,
I was 12 years old when my dad died of a heart attack.

My family was lucky enough to have a community that came together to support us -- including my surrogate father, who was a Teamster. He taught me so much about what it means to come together, work hard, fight for working people, and uplift communities. **From then on, I was determined to devote my life to helping others and fighting for civil rights.**

I became a civil rights attorney in the Department of Justice and President Obama's Head of Civil Rights -- where I prosecuted high profile cases from white-supremacist hate crimes to police brutality and lauched a RECORD number of police misconduct cases.

I became president of the Montgomery County Council, Maryland Labor Secretary, and U.S. Labor Secretary where I helped pass the nation's first living wage law, fought for workers, and held predatory companies accountable.

**And now, I'm running for governor because I want to use my experience fighting injustice to build a better Maryland where opportunity and justice are equal for all. But it's going to take all of us to _win this fight:_**

**_[Please team, I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in $7 or whatever you can to WIN this race and build a Maryland that works for everyone? Flipping this governorship from red to blue will NOT be easy, and I can't do it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815889/321542778/-865344249?refcode=bpi-em-20211218_MM4_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gNSX6aOLERmLH0PlQRoRA4BZC6cIER8Br-sjcCNrVI=)_**

clean_body: I'll level with you: December is going to be make-or-break for our campaign. Hey, Hate to bug you so late, but we wanted to make sure you saw Tom’s heartfelt note about his dad. Tom's spent his life in service to others, and he wants nothing more than to serve Maryland families as Governor, but we won't get there without your help. Right now, we're 9 hours away from our mid-month deadline with 28 contributions needed to close the gap and stay on track toward our December goal. We can’t stress enough just how important it is that we not fall behind this month – December is our final full month to fundraise before we file publicly for the first time. All eyes are going to be on our numbers, and we can’t afford to fall short and risk vulnerability in a primary this crowded. = Every dollar donated gives us the resources to sustain a winning campaign. Thank you for stepping up, believing in Tom, and investing in a brighter, more equitable future for Maryland families. – Team Tom \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Tom Perez Date: December 18, 2021 Subject: The power of this team = = Team, I was 12 years old when my dad died of a heart attack. My family was lucky enough to have a community that came together to support us -- including my surrogate father, who was a Teamster. He taught me so much about what it means to come together, work hard, fight for working people, and uplift communities. From then on, I was determined to devote my life to helping others and fighting for civil rights. I became a civil rights attorney in the Department of Justice and President Obama's Head of Civil Rights -- where I prosecuted high profile cases from white-supremacist hate crimes to police brutality and lauched a RECORD number of police misconduct cases. I became president of the Montgomery County Council, Maryland Labor Secretary, and U.S. Labor Secretary where I helped pass the nation's first living wage law, fought for workers, and held predatory companies accountable. And now, I'm running for governor because I want to use my experience fighting injustice to build a better Maryland where opportunity and justice are equal for all. But it's going to take all of us to win this fight: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = A lifetime fighting for civil rights has taught me a simple lesson: We will never achieve our potential as a state until ALL of us have access to equal opportunity. For too many Marylanders, accessibility is determined at birth and affects everything from lifelong employment opportunities and access to housing to access to quality healthcare and the ability to build wealth to pass onto their children. As your governor, I won’t let your destiny be determined by your zip code. This upcoming deadline is critical --= Thank you so much for your support, Tom Perez ****=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

---
Friend,
The Supreme Court is now stacked with conservative judges determined to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ If the Supreme Court is going to undo a 50 year old precedent and gut Roe v. Wade, Congress must step in and take action to guarantee this right.
[**Can we count on you to call on the Senate to protect the right to abortion care?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815919/321542948/324170042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dc74E2CFabuEPbliMTyOg68WLmpbXc1UJ4NbopTH-U=&emci=21fd227e-735f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cab46122-3d60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)

---
It is every person’s constitutional right to have access to a safe and legal abortion.
**The only way we're going to protect abortion access is by electing unapologetically pro-choice candidates, who will help protect this right through federal legislation.** Until we can add Kirsten's vote to the fight, _we're adding all of our voices to help keep abortion safe and legal._
[**Can we count on you to join us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815921/321542977/324170042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dc74E2CFabuEPbliMTyOg68WLmpbXc1UJ4NbopTH-U=&emci=21fd227e-735f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cab46122-3d60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815922/321542978/324170042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWI0NjEyMi0zZDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dc74E2CFabuEPbliMTyOg68WLmpbXc1UJ4NbopTH-U=&emci=21fd227e-735f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cab46122-3d60-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
---
Thank you for taking action,
Team Engel

subject: I refused to let the Deep State take down President

body:
But it didn't matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59049305:6eMkErEN7:m:1:3253819041:0D54D900386235590B3BA484AF26692E:r)
---
Peter,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59049305:6eMkErEN7:m:1:3253819041:0D54D900386235590B3BA484AF26692E:r)
---
**I knew full well the price I 'd have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn't matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59049305:6eMkErEN7:m:1:3253819041:0D54D900386235590B3BA484AF26692E:r)

---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren't many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don 't regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That's why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59049305:6eMkErEN7:m:1:3253819041:0D54D900386235590B3BA484AF26692E:r)

clean_body: The Senate confirmed former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel as Ambassador to Japan. | | | Team, Last night, the Senate voted to confirm former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel as Ambassador to Japan. Is this what Building Back Better looks like? The Establishment has decided that critical investments in long-term care, childcare, and climate have to wait till next year, yet they made plenty of time to elevate Rahm Emanuel to a cushy ambassadorship despite his flagrant disregard for Black life and his damning record of covering up the murder of a child. In October, Kina the opposition to Rahm Emanuel’s nomination. She penned a letter along with more than 20 Chicago activists, which made and was across national media. Kina also wrote an in USA Today calling for Emanuel to be voted down, and joined and with fellow Chicago movement leaders to oppose his nomination. It wasn’t enough, because our system is broken. We don’t just need more Democrats, we need better Democrats, like Kina Collins. It says everything we need to know about our leadership in Congress that the coverup of Laquan McDonald’s murder wasn’t enough to disqualify Rahm from this ambassadorship. People all over Chicago, all over IL-7, are in desperate need of support. Build Back Better is waiting for the Senate. In Solidarity, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

The European Commissioner for equality - yes, that is a real position - said in a leaked memo that we should stop saying "Merry Christmas" in an effort to promote "inclusive communication."

Pope Francis pointed to the Nazis as an example, and said that the European Union should "be careful not to be vehicles of ideological colonization."
In other words, don't let the woke cancel Christmas.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

body:
If you want action on just about ANY ISSUE you care about... we need the Core 4.
#

Raphael Warnock &
Maggie Hassan &
Catherine Cortez Masto &
Mark Kelly.
If you want action on climate change, we need the Core 4.
If you want action on voting rights, we need the Core 4.
This weekend, all across America, tens of thousands of people are contributing to re-elect “The Core 4”: Democratic incumbent Senators in tough elections.
They need you to join them, because if you want action on just about ANY ISSUE you care about... we need the Core 4.

Team Kelly

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A message about Democratic governors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I’m grateful for my colleagues’ faith in me. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816629/321548153/823540626?refcode=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWM0MDQ4NC00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NkUOsXypKq56txrGtFTqYqAv6cGJIo0At0BziDkejks=&emci=84cdeb7a-675f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, Last week, my colleagues in the Democratic Governors Association selected me to serve as chair for the coming year. I’m so grateful for their faith in me. **In 2022, there will be 36 elections for governor. It’s a critical year for our country — and I believe that we can win everywhere we compete.** As Democrats, we are committed to continuing to deliver for the American people on what is most important: recovering from COVID-19, expanding health care access, defending against climate change, securing voting rights, and so much more. While we realize there are difficult races ahead of us, it’s clear to me that these are the kitchen table issues that will inspire voters to head to the polls and choose their leaders. Speaking directly to what matters most is how we can win in 2022. Our only mission as leaders is to serve the people we represent. I’m confident that my DGA colleagues are ready and able to do just that from coast to coast — I believe that the interests of the American people are in safe hands with my colleagues. I look forward to working with the members of the DGA, and Governor Phil Murphy as vice chair, to re-elect our Democratic governors and flip states from red to blue. Onward to 2022, Roy [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816630/321548154/1877277611?amount=30&refcode=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWM0MDQ4NC00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NkUOsXypKq56txrGtFTqYqAv6cGJIo0At0BziDkejks=) P.S. **[If you know how critical it is to elect Democratic governors everywhere, please consider splitting a donation between our team and the Democratic Governors Association today to support our efforts in 2022, and thank you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816631/321548155/1877277611?amount=30&refcode=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWM0MDQ4NC00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NkUOsXypKq56txrGtFTqYqAv6cGJIo0At0BziDkejks=)** | **[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816632/321548156/1877277611?amount=30&refcode=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.eac40484-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWM0MDQ4NC00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NkUOsXypKq56txrGtFTqYqAv6cGJIo0At0BziDkejks=)**

This is obviously the worst-case scenario, but we need to be prepared for anything, especially in a race as competitive as ours -- last cycle, national Republicans spent $3 million trying to unseat Elaine, and we’re anticipating an even bigger investment from them this time around.

name: Warren Democrats
subject: President Biden can cancel student loan debt. Add your name if you’d like to see that happen right away:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It won’t be long before student loan payments are scheduled to resume — but we’re fighting to cancel student debt. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816959/321549080/-1964596891?ms=em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzU0MGNmZi00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfT5I1umm41_AfsO-R-0X2ByaUuR_0mqdyXYeRU7xrU=&emci=13ed52f8-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f7540cff-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908)
---
This past week, people started to receive notifications that it’s nearly time to restart payments on their student loans — payments that have been suspended for the bulk of the COVID-19 pandemic. But the pandemic isn’t over. Families are still struggling. And a new report says that restarting federal student loan payments after January 31 would suck $85 billion out of the economy. **Now is not the time to end the pause on payments. Now is the time for President Biden to cancel student debt. ** Elizabeth herself got a second chance at college via a state school that cost $50 per semester! Opportunities like those don’t seem to exist anymore. Now, two-thirds of people who go to state schools have to take out loans. And around 40% of borrowers overall weren’t able to finish their degree, so they’re stuck paying off their debt on jobs they can get with a high school diploma. **The system saddles people with debt — on top of all the costs for things like health care, housing, and child care that have zoomed through the roof. Forcing these resumed payments would stifle our economy by shoving such a huge burden onto people and families who need help the most.** Fortunately, President Biden can cancel student debt with the stroke of a pen — and doing just that would be such welcome news this holiday season. [_**Add your name if you agree that President Biden should cancel student debt before the pause on payments ends.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39816960/321549081/-255648121?ms=EMZ2N_STU_W_20211218_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzU0MGNmZi00NTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bfT5I1umm41_AfsO-R-0X2ByaUuR_0mqdyXYeRU7xrU=&emci=13ed52f8-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f7540cff-4560-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908) Millions of Americans have been battling with student loan debt, and that was well before COVID-19 upended our lives. Demanding that people restart their loan payments after the two years we’ve just experienced seriously fails to take into account the Americans who have struggled throughout the pandemic. Erasing $50,000 of student loan debt is the single most effective executive action President Biden can take towards repairing our economy and narrowing the racial wealth gap. Without being weighed down by student debt, more Americans can start a family, buy a home or a car, or launch that business they’ve always dreamed of. So let’s fight side by side as a grassroots movement and make our voices heard in this fight to cancel student debt. clean_body: It won’t be long before student loan payments are scheduled to resume — but we’re fighting to cancel student debt. | | | This past week, people started to receive notifications that it’s nearly time to restart payments on their student loans — payments that have been suspended for the bulk of the COVID-19 pandemic. But the pandemic isn’t over. Families are still struggling. And a new report says that restarting federal student loan payments after January 31 would suck $85 billion out of the economy. Now is not the time to end the pause on payments. Now is the time for President Biden to cancel student debt. Elizabeth herself got a second chance at college via a state school that cost $50 per semester! Opportunities like those don’t seem to exist anymore. Now, two-thirds of people who go to state schools have to take out loans. And around 40% of borrowers overall weren’t able to finish their degree, so they’re stuck paying off their debt on jobs they can get with a high school diploma. The system saddles people with debt — on top of all the costs for things like health care, housing, and child care that have zoomed through the roof. Forcing these resumed payments would stifle our economy by shoving such a huge burden onto people and families who need help the most. Fortunately, President Biden can cancel student debt with the stroke of a pen — and doing just that would be such welcome news this holiday season. Millions of Americans have been battling with student loan debt, and that was well before COVID-19 upended our lives. Demanding that people restart their loan payments after the two years we’ve just experienced seriously fails to take into account the Americans who have struggled throughout the pandemic. Erasing $50,000 of student loan debt is the single most effective executive action President Biden can take towards repairing our economy and narrowing the racial wealth gap. Without being weighed down by student debt, more Americans can start a family, buy a home or a car, or launch that business they’ve always dreamed of. So let’s fight side by side as a grassroots movement and make our voices heard in this fight to cancel student debt. Thanks, Team Warren | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2021 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
They lied about the cost of their bill
Peter,

We just caught Democrats in a $3,000,000,000,000 lie and [**we need your help to get the word out.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=98e49e199c234aaca9b628e2c27faaa5&_e=JhsnEj1hNxdsCrFqTcTmj1LsSnbIpBgGL-TrfVaNd9ERJzu5HbXz2qZGVc3rbMMHBECIW2jWjPiyUf8SJGCbF5L1wulPw8dyZwRSTMIwYyUr7gWIL7iYnf0gsDHmg2RXTXdrRDpgma-BMCcKmZ-Iv0UaQHY3UCDB5W-XeRKWj_aSpQfd0HMhgplAxybxh1k60i2WqbbWnhB5Ila4h1gfXK4LxlieMabPJBjPUlMrfPc16kTc12sT_VRXriG3Fft4Pb7nmMGkDJMyNFStsfzQvTaFZkQIC-CFNtKztBfTenlDfKz72zp5htOwAC36X0_7CtiOYcGgWjt7mCjZjl0M90CnCrk4NoKtlB75OAQmneEtd5wNg2iHSw3dzojvWLaCWEmpMsgLJGDu82qtIScIxoGlWCEQOBn1cNwiMbRhMR4C1r2nHKDgtxpQqbCahzOuGuR-Drzb8ulOAn64EX0W0g%3D%3D)

Their claim: Build Back Better would only cost $1.75T and would be completely paid for and add NOTHING to the deficit. **The Congressional Budget Office disagrees.**

Thankfully, our Senators Lindsey Graham and John Cornyn asked the CBO to disclose how much the bill would cost should the programs remain for 10 years.

**THE TRUTH: The CBO says the real cost of the bill would add $3T to the national debt over 10 years. Other models score the bill even higher at $4.6T!**

Peter, it’s EXTREMELY important that we get this news out to the American public and don’t let the Left cover up their lie. [**Show us that you won’t let Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer’s Left pull the wool over your eyes by sending in $20 or more right now!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=98e49e199c234aaca9b628e2c27faaa5&_e=JhsnEj1hNxdsCrFqTcTmj1LsSnbIpBgGL-TrfVaNd9ERJzu5HbXz2qZGVc3rbMMHBECIW2jWjPiyUf8SJGCbF5L1wulPw8dyZwRSTMIwYyUr7gWIL7iYnf0gsDHmg2RXTXdrRDpgma-BMCcKmZ-Iv0UaQHY3UCDB5W-XeRKWj_aSpQfd0HMhgplAxybxh1k60i2WqbbWnhB5Ila4h1gfXK4LxlieMabPJBjPUlMrfPcDuKhn2ux6zmmY0WSKMp6gug1IVwkSgzSjevwVwJgBGSxKMU_WuthG9ebXb6U7vaVPdIGCvfcG5_8tuDs5lopQMID0qDLTb3dwfPtRnv8_BdtIAiGpoQeEOFaSqqUPStMPjmdjFO6T7HKpkMpEdt4zHRDemrBBy9HMBrk1oE-u77rPwCctAdZemyb5In3HneeFB73jKownnQtx6XGGTp-aOKEDuJZ_SQobf_ux5JADiA%3D%3D)

clean_body: They lied about the cost of their bill Peter, We just caught Democrats in a $3,000,000,000,000 lie and Their claim: Build Back Better would only cost $1.75T and would be completely paid for and add NOTHING to the deficit. The Congressional Budget Office disagrees. Thankfully, our Senators Lindsey Graham and John Cornyn asked the CBO to disclose how much the bill would cost should the programs remain for 10 years. THE TRUTH: The CBO says the real cost of the bill would add $3T to the national debt over 10 years. Other models score the bill even higher at $4.6T! Peter, it’s EXTREMELY important that we get this news out to the American public and don’t let the Left cover up their lie. We, as Republicans, have a moral responsibility to let the American people know that the Dems have pushed a bill into the Senate that is not at all what they advertised. And they’re not just lying to Republicans - they’re lying to Democrats too! We cannot let this bill pass Peter. You’re our final hope and we only have a few days left before the Dems lock Americans into paying for their lie for the next 50 years. name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Send a message to our Senators: Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Whether we’re workers, parents, or just human beings who care about the future of the planet, we need our Senators to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better bill now.

The House of Representatives passed this key legislation to create a more equitable nation. But now we need the Senate to do the same. Even though it doesn't have everything on the president's or our wish list, BBB is still a BIG DEAL.

- It's the largest effort to fight climate change in our history and will result in good jobs in clean energy.
- It’s also the biggest endeavor to expand health care in the past ten years and will increase coverage greatly. -
- It will help create more affordable housing and put more money into the pockets of working people.
- BBB will provide home care to elderly people with disabilities, also creating more jobs in the home care sector.
- It offers families much needed support by establishing universal pre-K — halving families' spending on child care — and giving working families up to $300 monthly with the Child Tax Credit.

If you believe in a progressive America and a progressive Pennsylvania, please contact our Senators — Sens. Pat Toomey and Bob Casey Jr. — TODAY. It’s easy, just click below.
CONTACT YOUR SENATOR NOW

[https://keystoneprogressaction.com/support-build-back-better/]

Americans need their lawmakers to advocate for them, and they can do that through Build Back Better.

Thank you for standing with us.

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

P.S. If you want to support our efforts to build a progressive Pennsylvania through mobilizing, organizing, and education, please donate today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121821 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121821]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

[Source: The Week] Pelosi has spent more than 3 decades in Congress, enriching herself above all else while peddling the Left’s radical, progressive agenda. But now, we finally have the chance to TAKE BACK the People’s House:Leaked reports claim Pelosi will RETIRE if we win the 5 seats needed to FLIP the majority. As 1 of those 5 must-win races, this is our moment to send Pelosi packing once and for all -- but I’m counting on your sustained support to help get the job done. name: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] via Gottheimer HQ
subject: This is serious stuff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Have you heard?? There’s currently a national cream cheese shortage threatening bagels and cheesecakes!

In all seriousness, this is hurting New Jersey small businesses, reaffirming the importance of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, which will strengthen our domestic and international transportation system to help get goods moving.
Are you worried about the cream cheese shortage? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/are-you-worried-about-cream-cheese-shortage]YES [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/are-you-worried-about-cream-cheese-shortage] No [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/are-you-worried-about-cream-cheese-shortage]

And this isn’t just about cream cheese. The pandemic-driven supply chain crisis is preventing many hospitals from receiving the equipment that they need to save lives.

That’s why Josh’s Affordability Agenda for Jersey calls for the National Guard to unload critical supplies for hospitals and advocates for a Strategic Shipping Reserve.

This is serious stuff. We have to get on top of these issues by rolling out the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill and carrying out Josh’s Affordability Agenda for Jersey.

— Team Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. That’s why Josh’s Affordability Agenda for Jersey calls for the National Guard to unload critical supplies for hospitals and advocates for a Strategic Shipping Reserve. This is serious stuff. We have to get on top of these issues by rolling out the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill and carrying out Josh’s Affordability Agenda for Jersey. — Team Gottheimer Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] VOLUNTEER [] Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 [] [] []

name: John Fetterman
subject: An update from the campaign trail [Photos included]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Gisele will kill me if I don’t share some photos from our last few stops on the campaign trail, so bear with me.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
Over the past few weeks I’ve been on the campaign trail, traveling across our great Commonwealth to meet with voters, supporters, + Pennsylvanians.
The best part of being on the road is meeting new people in every county, because every person and every vote matters. **[And if you can chip in $5 or another amount today, we’ll have the resources we need to continue this outreach.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?amount=5&refcode=em20211218-3882&t=1&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)**
Now, Gisele would kill me if I didn’t share some photos from our last few stops on the campaign trail, so bear with me (my face is actually in these ones though, sorry Gisele). 😂 Plus, there’s a surprise from August at the end of this email if you read all the way through...
First, our family had the *honor* to walk in the Historic Steel Valley Christmas Parade. Followed by the one + only Big Jim’s Rueben. 🥪 😋
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=2&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
Then, I got to spend some personal time with my best gal in Philly. 🥰
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=3&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
Next, we were off to Chester County at Uncle B’s BBQ in Phoenixville. Not only did I get to share our campaign’s vision with working people and families, but I *also* got to eat some delicious BBQ.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=4&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
Finally, we made our way to Washington County on the West Virginia border to talk to some folks about abolishing the filibuster (spoiler: *everyone* in the room was on board with that plan).
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=5&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
Derek, we’re 170,000+ donors strong. We have support in towns, cities, and BBQ joints all across Pennsylvania.
Flipping this seat 🔵 is a 67 county effort and we’ve *always* been the 67 county campaign.
**[Will you please make a donation to our U.S. Senate campaign today? Together we’re building something really special, but we simply can’t do it without your help. Gisele and I are so, so grateful for any support you can send our way.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=6&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)**
I’ll be back with more updates from the road soon. But in the meantime — here is your surprise from August...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38665?refcode=em20211218-3882&t=26&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
Gisele asked him to draw me on a placemat and this is what we got. 😂
Anyway, thanks for everything, Derek.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211218-3882-footer&t=27&refcode2=3882_434096_mbKD1o&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3882%2E434096%2EmbKD1o)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
