name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Ending 2021 on a High Note [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=8b20302a9b514b5cac3a80e2e9e43289&_e=OusZ84XIblejepQy5bODNGQGx8P9hOvQ7i0d67iatKdlqCrTwk-Zy9IWOn9xCBzSYvQc3JftacJUW4yoy67Dx_tq50cD-mYFYlIMwpB8ByqzCWug1_0hqqjUQWaV2uAqEA-Qf849DcRKXeXN-z4f0o14TYpbD7Dl3b5-mF732orOhKQxS84N5Th9j1Mz5ErOlfAxKRg8oBBspIcApZ_3FUDSHMobn2M8UrFTenqfoRIkoYqLP4AoOk-AYvqahw-Yg5ays6-ZOTiSlNdqTXhprA%3D%3D) Peter, As we enter the home stretch of 2021, I wanted to send a quick email to let you know what we’ve been up to in the district over the past two weeks. Julie, the kids, and I had a great time at the annual Ranch Car Club Charity Car Show and Toy Drive in Westlake Village last week. Huge thanks to the organizers for helping make the holidays brighter for local children in need. As a grandson of a WWII Navy veteran, it was a privilege to commemorate the anniversary of Pearl Harbor at the VFW Museum of Military History at the Simi Valley Town Center. We're lucky to have this great museum in our community. If you haven’t been yet, go check it out! Our team had a blast at the Camarillo Christmas Parade last Saturday, where we shared our message with a huge number of community members! Thank you to my amazing volunteers and to everyone who stopped by our booth. Last week, I attended the State of the City Address in my hometown of Thousand Oaks – where I had the chance to listen to (and learn from) community leaders from the private, nonprofit and public sectors. I’m passionate about supporting local business, which is why I was happy to attend the (rain-delayed) ribbon cutting ceremony this week for Honey Cup Coffeehouse & Creamery – a wonderful, family-owned spot that opened recently in Newbury Park. If you’d like to nominate a local business for us to spotlight, please email us at [info@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:info@mattjacobsforcongress.com "info@mattjacobsforcongress.com"). I also had a great time at the Greater Conejo Chamber of Commerce mixer in Newbury Park on Wednesday. It was inspiring meeting so many local entrepreneurs, business owners, and job creators. In national news, we lost a great American recently with the passing of former senator and presidential nominee Bob Dole. I’ll never forget the image of Bob Dole rising from his wheelchair to salute fellow World War II veteran President George H. W. Bush – two men who personified the Greatest Generation. On a happier note, I had a fantastic time at the SoCal Log Cabin Republican’s holiday party at the Nixon Library. Thank you to California LCR Chairman Matthew Craffey for the invitation and CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson for her uplifting speech! | |
---
* * *
Finally, I’d like to say thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign throughout 2021. I’m profoundly grateful for my incredible volunteers and for the more than 1500 people (!!) who have donated to our campaign.

While our supporters come from many walks of life, they all have the following things in common: They care deeply about our country and community. They believe that America’s best days lie ahead. And they know that we can _**WIN**_ this race.

If you feel the same way, come join our team! Email [jenni@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:jenni@mattjacobsforcongress.com) to become a volunteer.

And if you’re in a position to donate, please consider making a contribution before the year ends. In the new year, we’ll be opening a campaign headquarters, hiring additional staff, and ramping up our field operations – so you have my word that every cent will be put to the best possible use.
[**Donate Here**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=8b20302a9b514b5cac3a80e2e9e43289&_e=OusZ84XIblejepQy5bODNF4iGUonkuOG177smmbLTSbKWoi9Es_Hh-0hHarc4xFXUQs9HgZqiPl2EvOK9-2_MdCfTnO9_eBuCQgksOUADgdqt5DFiUXEqUemNgmP-XnXRlfIiYKCw9kZpEABjMfqgDO_W_1WsUZIJ0ET4-VJaiE4wTXJzDSsWpzLqfZT9KCbuV26IrI_OP7GuOhlEob1r0LSEGPljbbTpIDUAJyLuvmWaJF0L6UmzHd4CoY67eskCH8oc7dGDpu3oqmoNwpW5iJTIF52crgSH8JKtO8l-nwkE_zR2T1Erj3AOUcwnZiuoq6jTsPdLVttUNNMVIysPB-rwKz2HW1tFxB0Ys8s6hBia9R3JZ8zC8q3y93mEWsRoFdv0DtOg3l8RyWSHGxv65oq2lQ5UyWz3kRy-gkixB_ar21a-NVGZxTNEb7v7cxO)
Wishing everyone lots of health and happiness this holiday season. I look forward to seeing you all in 2022!

Matt

clean_body: Ending 2021 on a High Note Peter, As we enter the home stretch of 2021, I wanted to send a quick email to let you know what we’ve been up to in the district over the past two weeks. Julie, the kids, and I had a great time at the annual Ranch Car Club Charity Car Show and Toy Drive in Westlake Village last week. Huge thanks to the organizers for helping make the holidays brighter for local children in need. As a grandson of a WWII Navy veteran, it was a privilege to commemorate the anniversary of Pearl Harbor at the VFW Museum of Military History at the Simi Valley Town Center. We're lucky to have this great museum in our community. If you haven’t been yet, go check it out! Our team had a blast at the Camarillo Christmas Parade last Saturday, where we shared our message with a huge number of community members! Thank you to my amazing volunteers and to everyone who stopped by our booth. Last week, I attended the State of the City Address in my hometown of Thousand Oaks – where I had the chance to listen to (and learn from) community leaders from the private, nonprofit and public sectors. I’m passionate about supporting local business, which is why I was happy to attend the (rain-delayed) ribbon cutting ceremony this week for Honey Cup Coffeehouse & Creamery – a wonderful, family-owned spot that opened recently in Newbury Park. If you’d like to nominate a local business for us to spotlight, please email us at mailto:info@mattjacobsforcongress.com "info@mattjacobsforcongress.com". I also had a great time at the Greater Conejo Chamber of Commerce mixer in Newbury Park on Wednesday. It was inspiring meeting so many local entrepreneurs, business owners, and job creators. In national news, we lost a great American recently with the passing of former senator and presidential nominee Bob Dole. I’ll never forget the image of Bob Dole rising from his wheelchair to salute fellow World War II veteran President George H. W. Bush – two men who personified the Greatest Generation. On a happier note, I had a fantastic time at the SoCal Log Cabin Republican’s holiday party at the Nixon Library. Thank you to California LCR Chairman Matthew Craffey for the invitation and CAGOP Chairwoman Jessica Patterson for her uplifting speech! | | Finally, I’d like to say thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign throughout 2021. I’m profoundly grateful for my incredible volunteers and for the more than 1500 people (!!) who have donated to our campaign. While our supporters come from many walks of life, they all have the following things in common: They care deeply about our country and community. They believe that America’s best days lie ahead. And they know that we can WIN** this race. If you feel the same way, come join our team! Email mailto:jenni@mattjacobsforcongress.com to become a volunteer. And if you’re in a position to donate, please consider making a contribution before the year ends. In the new year, we’ll be opening a campaign headquarters, hiring additional staff, and ramping up our field operations – so you have my word that every cent will be put to the best possible use. Wishing everyone lots of health and happiness this holiday season. I look forward to seeing you all in 2022! Matt | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals or federal government contractors are prohibited. clean_body: | | | | | Hey, can you donate $10 right now to help us defeat Trumpism in Pennsylvania? The behavior of Pennsylvania GOP leadership is increasingly extreme and alarming, friend. It’s not just that they’re embracing increasingly radical policies like abortion bans — it’s that they’re still fighting to overturn the last election while undermining the right to vote in our Commonwealth. Their latest tactic is nothing short of ridiculous: Pennsylvania Republicans want to take your social security and driver’s license numbers and give them away to a third party — all to fuel Trump’s Big Lie. ****** | | | | | | | | | | | | | I’ve taken the GOP extremists pushing the Big Lie to court dozens of times — and beaten them again and again. Now, they’d like nothing more than to defeat us in this election and flip Pennsylvania red. We are bracing for the most extreme and, frankly, unhinged attacks we’ve ever seen against us as this race heats up. And fighting back against those attacks will take hard work, resources, and a ton of grit. **** | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything you’re doing to protect our democracy. Josh Shapiro Candidate for Governor of PA | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. subject: The Left claimed the build back better would cost $1.75T
disclaimer_text: paid for and add NOTHING to the deficit
body:
FALSE: Actual cost $3.477T
Peter,

We just caught Democrats in a $3,000,000,000,000 lie and [**we need your help to get the word out.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2bbcc7b02fb4413d900e0ba09ce6c4e7&_e=1firjSiFZrXcUvJUkE9hUq43IbPfMnvkmwNPK_ls8HBNDjHPnXUHaS3iFP3Ia05ZjklTghVaBoUjk8b0ZYqZgJFUut7gRpxCE-HsrCeDy1LXDpf0Q2R1H5-BT7HWXnNPdSPNV9SyMIwXvvdgFEoqnu072mEzv0GqzPBMITWnKM4ZoaV1XX812aclCUifNyZ82Wb430PwyKiIKV2kIohQhRGe6qDMPteuY0RlzBHK5q4y7KZ-SoTHGl_eQ6SxpRUQ63aNyrBavO1kAYH50iSy8rtRnA2XQjzjJrVAk7Yp49B8RapF0YZOz0hfHHz6GdNyA8s_KOLpA0olMaJBxmXHMfvQu4XsNPhm_PGrrZBn7iqwe0BREdVP4e1FLNOPzrv2xdxsArYE2LsfD7Z603tb_UvvCxILlkDfogp7l0wn6REFLO0zrnyYdqmwbzV2uDzRp1VXdm-BQzXqs3-MJ105dA%3D%3D)

Their claim: Build Back Better would only cost $1.75T and would be completely paid for and add NOTHING to the deficit. **The Congressional Budget Office disagrees.**

Thankfully, our Senators Lindsey Graham and John Cornyn asked the CBO to disclose how much the bill would cost should the programs remain for 10 years.

**THE TRUTH: The CBO says the real cost of the bill would add $3T to the national debt over 10 years. Other models score the bill even higher at $4.6T!**

Peter, it’s EXTREMELY important that we get this news out to the American public and don’t let the Left cover up their lie. [**Show us that you won’t let Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer’s Left pull the wool over your eyes by sending in $20 or more right now!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2bbcc7b02fb4413d900e0ba09ce6c4e7&_e=1firjSiFZrXcUvJUkE9hUq43IbPfMnvkmwNPK_ls8HBNDjHPnXUHaS3iFP3Ia05ZjklTghVaBoUjk8b0ZYqZgJFUut7gRpxCE-HsrCeDy1LXDpf0Q2R1H5-BT7HWXnNPdSPNV9SyMIwXvvdgFEoqnu072mEzv0GqzPBMITWnKM4ZoaV1XX812aclCUifNyZ82Wb430PwyKiIKV2kIohQhRGe6qDMPteuY0RlzBHK5q5getWOxGacpG7Y3ciqUPuiC_mBfAZVt51tiWsQsSoc_NsJlL2A7WU1X9uW1xBS1IzZg1z9fiq3Efm47dqgPC02THYgOfpn0qfwEPO467MzIE70UGPn2qAmmUva9MPOfi7Np2wEkjESveZUnKWX9PQTsO_JuIlrw6omhs6xbdTmOi5srcuds96Q8ZYf8svNntEvnIpPYo_nNNQQ39p5YDaLCKe5eUMaDD-Mm1vDe9X6PA%3D%3D)

[** HELP US SPREAD THE NEWS ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2bbcc7b02fb4413d900e0ba09ce6c4e7&_e=1firjSiFZrXcUvJUkE9hUq43IbPfMnvkmwNPK_ls8HBNDjHPnXUHaS3iFP3Ia05ZjklTghVaBoUjk8b0ZYqZgJFUut7gRpxCE-HsrCeDy1LXDpf0Q2R1H5-BT7HWXnNPdSPNV9SyMIwXvvdgFEoqnu072mEzv0GqzPBMITWnKM4ZoaV1XX812aclCUifNyZ82Wb430PwyKiIKV2kIohQhRGe6qDMPteuY0RlzBHK5q7lBhyXAeRr3j6xaQcZMH0oWTl8BLxhneVFU7mPuaJMmGlD40LhqTBGVHKB4IjMthE__o-W_yoggIotx-dZClYld342z9UqGxgr7gpihIGCk3WWrRvjLA9DEGnXKT7M4BIVRH4lPQwTnS-UEUzDMP45fa7vi_o4JNnzbbEF5hECvcCPqdSpIunI7C0jPeM4XBFoZd2IFu8ifkYNIooBNkvc0naI2E0gQt30sXXqMjkuIA%3D%3D)

We, as Republicans, have a moral responsibility to let the American people know that the Dems have pushed a bill into the Senate that is not at all what they advertised. And they’re not just lying to Republicans - they’re lying to Democrats too!

[**Peter it’s people like you that allowed for 2 Republican Senators to uncover this major lie and now we need your help to get the word out to the American people before it’s too late. Please send in whatever you can right now!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2bbcc7b02fb4413d900e0ba09ce6c4e7&_e=1firjSiFZrXcUvJUkE9hUq43IbPfMnvkmwNPK_ls8HBNDjHPnXUHaS3iFP3Ia05ZjklTghVaBoUjk8b0ZYqZgJFUut7gRpxCE-HsrCeDy1LXDpf0Q2R1H5-BT7HWXnNPdSPNV9SyMIwXvvdgFEoqnu072mEzv0GqzPBMITWnKM4ZoaV1XX812aclCUifNyZ82Wb430PwyKiIKV2kIohQhRGe6qDMPteuY0RlzBHK5q4oJgC7lz1Hq170vvpUTq5Ys7fEjtndFNSAMu7mOFDiE2IdXP-i0Lh12fv_DmBo1ZJgLKM0C3eJPaFgR1cPFmzS58C5jdFv1xYdAusqMQ4chDv6suxW50U_-bm9fLxPHxemKERVQNIvDIHaJpnOHECG4gaVpmES_4xublXLIw1iu4eJ2OpT6dWJqTx7idgmLvEfgQ1vxV_ObGGrfju3t5caziDF_PQEHn46HL5ZTzmL_w%3D%3D)

**We cannot let this bill pass Peter. You’re our final hope and we only have a few days left before the Dems lock Americans into paying for their lie for the next 50 years.**

[** HELP US SPREAD THE NEWS ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2bbcc7b02fb4413d900e0ba09ce6c4e7&_e=1firjSiFZrXcUvJUkE9hUq43IbPfMnvkmwNPK_ls8HBNDjHPnXUHaS3iFP3Ia05ZjklTghVaBoUjk8b0ZYqZgJFUut7gRpxCE-HsrCeDy1LXDpf0Q2R1H5-BT7HWXnNPdSPNV9SyMIwXvvdgFEoqnu072mEzv0GqzPBMITWnKM4ZoaV1XX812aclCUifNyZ82Wb430PwyKiIKV2kIohQhRGe6qDMPteuY0RlzBHK5q7eToFM3z756V7D7FxTjQlN9Xh36oJF2GhFnbl22uU022FzjNFza89FtvoKL92LRZllsr5fTY7shNf2A0WU3lxVNYklPsalX61yxkG3E6snL4qVYE7xzOoPQZNnqE-G2wPFTRJbNLodLJd0hhc7dkgySS7ayEL8ht0U8wPJKDySV6t_FR5is3MUOPHT5APQRz3bmjBWPokpFGrM3FuNbGiZptovKReSwL71StgY2ckP3A%3D%3D)

Joe Biden and the Democrats have made it clear:

**The only way to STOP them from controlling your life is with a Republican Senate majority.**

_First, they tried to tell you what to put in your body._

_Then they tried to indoctrinate our country with critical race theory._

**Who knows what the socialist Left will come up with next?**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Corporate Democrats say one thing and do another
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In 2018, we recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to run for Congress.

In 2020, Justice Democrats Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Marie Newman won
their seats in competitive primary elections.

And in 2022, we’ve recruited five Justice Democrats to join them. Odessa
Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Jessica Cisneros, Kina Collins, and Summer Lee are
running for Congress to expand the Justice Democrats coalition, and build
political power in the House.

Working people are sick and tired of Democratic politicians saying one
thing, and then voting against the interests of working people. But the
biggest obstacle to electing progressives to Congress isn’t a shortage of
demand for change, it’s a shortage of resources. Our ability to elect the
Justice Democrats slate depends on raising even just a fraction of the
money that the establishment Democratic machine makes from their Wall
Street, Big Pharma, and corporate mega-donors.

We have a goal of raising $20,000 between our five recruited candidates
before the end of the month. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87654?refcode=em20211218-21043&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]Will you split a contribution between
Odessa, Rana, Jessica, Kina, and Summer to make sure they can put up big
numbers against their establishment opponents?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87654?refcode=em20211218-21043&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]Contribute $3

In just a few years, the candidates we’ve elected to Congress, like AOC,
Ilhan, Jamaal, Cori, and others have made a tremendous impact — while
do-nothing incumbents have done little but raise more corporate PAC money
for their re-election and maintain the status quo.

The establishment has proven that even with the majority, they won’t fight
for our values. If we want to cancel student loan debt, pass Medicare for
All, and win a Green New Deal, we’re going to have to elect more
progressives to Congress.

When you contribute directly to our recruited candidates, you’re
supporting five working-class women of color, who will make a difference
for working people in Congress. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87654?refcode=em20211218-21043&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]Can the JD slate count on you to split
a $3 contribution between their five campaigns?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87654?refcode=em20211218-21043&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211218-21043-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21043_1203867_695EF1&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21043%2E1203867%2E695EF1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Did you miss it? ---->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
"the most alarming Trump rally yet" here in Iowa
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39817620/321553236/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2NjZiMS01MDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhvKAwgbmaIqgMoXUaCPD9zr0B4_dmu4LXynhwNeGVg=)
Peter – just recently, Donald Trump held a rally in Iowa that a CNN opinion piece calls**"the most alarming Trump rally yet."** During his speech, Trump welcomed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), to the stage, praising Sen. Grassley for always being there whenever he needed him. **Then, he gave Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," which Sen. Grassley enthusiastically accepted.**
Moments like this show why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important – and why I need to ask for your donation to stay on track with our fundraising for the month. But before I do, I hope you'll let me explain.
You see, this rally has political commentators especially worried because top-ranking Republicans, like Sen. Grassley, are making their allegiances clear. Instead of choosing facts, reason and our democracy, they're choosing Donald Trump – the man who incited a deadly riot on our Capitol. But frankly, I'm not surprised at my opponent's actions. Sen. Grassley has a long history of advancing radical ideas at the expense of our country.
Just look at his time as chair of the Judiciary Committee, when he blocked President Obama from appointing a Supreme Court justice and then rammed through the controversial confirmations of Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. It's not shocking to me that he'll happily defend Trump's attempts to overturn the election and put our democracy at risk if it helps further his radical agenda.
We have seen as clear as day that Sen. Grassley will stand by Trump no matter what – and that Trump is all in to protect Sen. Grassley. **Together, they'll do everything they can to take back the Senate and reclaim the White House. Our race here in Iowa is critical to stopping them. **
That's why I'm asking you to support my campaign, Peter. You see, I'm still short $3,292 of what I should raise by TONIGHT to stay on track for my end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. With Trump and Sen. Grassley working hand in hand to keep Iowa red and take back the Senate, we cannot afford to have shortfalls. **[Please, can you donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now, so we can defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and stop Trump in his tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39817621/321553237/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2NjZiMS01MDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhvKAwgbmaIqgMoXUaCPD9zr0B4_dmu4LXynhwNeGVg=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39817622/321553238/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE2NjZiMS01MDYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IhvKAwgbmaIqgMoXUaCPD9zr0B4_dmu4LXynhwNeGVg=)
---
Thank you for always standing beside me, especially in moments like these.

– Abby

name: Josh Harder
subject: We just got something done?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcRc5Hv18NgzXYVFmkwb2cZzMHdiaME8CYNejYgq9PI=/mTFlKkKgJOgCHGc8DnfQfiX4PgUoDI4Vkifbqwf0Fr4=?refcode=E13030-20211217-BillPassing-header-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, Here in California we're dealing with some crazy price hikes - especially the cost of gas ($5 a gallon?!) One of the causes for many of these crazy prices is a big backlog at our ports. And unlike some of my colleagues who get on TV and just complain, I actually wanted to _do something about it._ **So I 'm happy to share that a group of us got together to push our bill - the Ocean Shipping Reform Act - and last week it passed the House!** First and foremost, this is going to help us lower costs because it's going to make it less expensive to ship goods. Second, it's going to decrease the backlog so you aren't waiting so long to get the gifts you need for Christmas, and to help keep the shelves stocked. And finally, it's going to help us fight China's influence on our shipping markets. [**If you want to see me continue leading the fight to pass even more critical legislation just like this, chip in now to help me win re-election and keep this seat blue!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcRc5Hv18NgzXYVFmkwb2cZzMHdiaME8CYNejYgq9PI=/mTFlKkKgJOgCHGc8DnfQfiX4PgUoDI4Vkifbqwf0Fr4=?refcode=E13030-20211217-BillPassing-SL-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/BcRc5Hv18NgzXYVFmkwb2cZzMHdiaME8CYNejYgq9PI=/mTFlKkKgJOgCHGc8DnfQfiX4PgUoDI4Vkifbqwf0Fr4=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13030-20211217-BillPassing-EL-Economy-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

clean_body: | | Peter, Here in California we're dealing with some crazy price hikes - especially the cost of gas ($5 a gallon?!) One of the causes for many of these crazy prices is a big backlog at our ports. And unlike some of my colleagues who get on TV and just complain, I actually wanted to do something about it. So I 'm happy to share that a group of us got together to push our bill - the Ocean Shipping Reform Act - and last week it passed the House! First and foremost, this is going to help us lower costs because it's going to make it less expensive to ship goods. Second, it's going to decrease the backlog so you aren't waiting so long to get the gifts you need for Christmas, and to help keep the shelves stocked. And finally, it's going to help us fight China's influence on our shipping markets. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We pulled together a big coalition of support to get this done including a bipartisan group of Democrats and Republicans. I know it's not the most newsworthy of issues, but it really is going to help our families make the most of their paychecks. What I'll say in conclusion is this - I hope I've been proving to you that I'm strong in my convictions and also determined to get past the political divides to get real things done. That's why I ran for office and I'm staying laser focused on it. Cheers to making a dysfunctional Congress a tiny bit more functional! - Josh = =

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6683%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=N3rsMGWNfdJx8NjWURobsg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68064%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1enlYQcduacRkLQwg7ACw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68075%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IYzQcspZW02J8d32S69pWA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68075%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IYzQcspZW02J8d32S69pWA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6683%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=N3rsMGWNfdJx8NjWURobsg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6683%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=N3rsMGWNfdJx8NjWURobsg&sysid=1)

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z32du9g7qn1kjual8tdl08cb3kd2pof6fn5u6k08_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3hm6or4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfkg84o0bu6pj16sobsr243bbih3vd1k3a357mao_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3hm6or4c3h2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq9u1fsfk76kpon8ir25357isq9g7mell1cvbm78_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s3hm6or4c3h2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ken Russell
subject: An economy for everyone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Hi Peter,
Teddy Roosevelt is my favorite President for a couple of reasons. He was an adventurer, a lover of nature, and most importantly he was a brave and bold advocate for economic justice. His commitment to the pursuit of an American economy that worked for EVERYONE is what I will try and emulate when I get to the Senate.
I have spent my time in office working to secure living wages and affordable housing in Miami. Will you chip in to allow me to continue that work once elected to the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email]
The wealth disparity today is a crisis the likes of which haven't been seen since the 1800s. Workers make a TINY fraction of what their bosses do, housing is incredibly expensive. Young people aren't having children or buying homes because the economy only serves the handful of people at the top.
The American people are ready for the unjust and rigged economy of the last 50 years to end. It is time for the 1% to pay their fair share. Poverty, inequality, and decaying social mobility are plaguing our country, and it manifests EVERYWHERE. We are running a grassroots campaign because we won’t be bought by dark money, morally bankrupt lobbyists, or SuperPACs. That means we need you. Chip in $19.01 to my campaign in honor of Teddy! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email&amount=19.01]
I know that housing and fair wages are human rights. Our democracy and resulting economy must be by the people and for the people. Economic justice and equality will be at the top of my list when I enter the halls of the Capitol.
In Solidarity,
Ken Russell
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr-affordability?refcode=2112-affordability-email]
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.

Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, **and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:**
In his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about **sending the military to the states he lost** in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, **"If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." **
We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. **I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.**
This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. **But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.**
**Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election.** And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. **I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:**

subject: A ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818423/321557092/-825069922?refcode=20211211_MF_allofus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgxYzU3Mi01YjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXlHit4q-wY6yLe0gmEC0a-59uVhFQQQzEctQiyShhY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818424/321557093/-1217423743?refcode=20211218_MF_threatRE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgxYzU3Mi01YjYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXlHit4q-wY6yLe0gmEC0a-59uVhFQQQzEctQiyShhY=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. **Baseball? ❌ Canceled

Christmas? ❌ Canceled**

**They are trying to cancel America - are you going to let them?** | [**CLICK HERE TO STOP THEM**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=e99c951f70c144118b3b1444e2776172&_e=tvnDjq9sulz1y3xpyTAc62-PD_9eDcJckHlJMidSAx3UTzCR3h4SxH7jVO62K7Hc6XizYYzeNspp1IQVJypZJc2CceKRlH7PrglUAp5pPmhKFLItRpJDaR1n51q8CJCHnNZqGPU0oz2-66lJISGsMZnoOVnZsLFDJHNe8XPlGsQ9mvy-kqOFPeN_hlRth0ZR8I9hEcw6MAa--BMIvzrpHDkQLCEh8m0EeceYnoUGaqUptC3r-JZZoJvoJjHbiyRlzUFq66Xs4Rqg2ErNNDi1XykrBdJy5WO1Sg7KRmOwS5zOcwvhMyyA4cvzEO700PBHVFnJkMQi-OFcyyiBkMONHXEDCg2Fd53WeUnghTmMBXlWZsMxL32wzYxdrR86CzM9vUtIRELzKTZJ-rUN7qct_NNkLgtPKa25xaOKKmWmJe_FqyknuKCogkOFh234tTWzQNCXlKkroVf9HbgID-It5aj0kMxcPYpf7_WqCfC3ERI%3D)

If we’re going to defend our country against the attacks of the Socialist Squad and their cadre of pink-haired communists, then we need to do everything we can to elect strong, conservative voices who will not bow down to the mob or cave to their demands. We need leaders who will protect our rights and freedoms, leaders who aren’t afraid of the Twitter mobs or the woke Left.

**We need leaders like Ted Budd in the U.S. Senate.** [**ELECT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=e99c951f70c144118b3b1444e2776172&_e=tvnDjq9sulz1y3xpyTAc62-PD_9eDcJckHlJMidSAx3UTzCR3h4SxH7jVO62K7Hc6XizYYzeNspp1IQVJypZJc2CceKRlH7PrglUAp5pPmhKFLItRpJDaR1n51q8CJCHnNZqGPU0oz2-66lJISGsMZnoOVnZsLFDJHNe8XPlGsQ9mvy-kqOFPeN_hlRth0ZR8I9hEcw6MAa--BMIvzrpHDkQLCEh8m0EeceYnoUGaqUptC3r-JZZoJvoJjHbiyRlzUFq66Xs4Rqg2ErNNDi1X_8KLuW5GEj8mbBRT3ipb6mtuuqFsKD9etoKX5xhBmgaxdcoZl6mxXvG3Alb1IueGZ-SWSqXvKE6s4KS3E7CplYkFIgiLbikFg7BMvlmSSsrgq8tS7JBQqaq31liWBNxGq3ErHC_60d1wpUaUvpZsAXvxTYlFq4HSW6kw_lFtaXdvoJKJoqhGB1djvjDDqAB3K6t05RY4ettBRNVOmrg9Os%3D)
---

Ted is running against a two-time loser who’s attacked President Trump. And, if Ted doesn’t reach his fundraising goals now, **North Carolina could flip Blue. We can’t take that chance.** Friend, I don’t need to tell you how important it is that we protect our state from the schemes of the Radical Left.

clean_body: | Friend, At every turn, the Radical Left is trying to destroy our national treasures. Baseball? ❌ Canceled Dr. Seuss? ❌ Canceled Christmas? ❌ Canceled They are trying to cancel America - are you going to let them? | If we’re going to defend our country against the attacks of the Socialist Squad and their cadre of pink-haired communists, then we need to do everything we can to elect strong, conservative voices who will not bow down to the mob or cave to their demands. We need leaders who will protect our rights and freedoms, leaders who aren’t afraid of the Twitter mobs or the woke Left. We need leaders like Ted Budd in the U.S. Senate. Ted is running against a two-time loser who’s attacked President Trump. And, if Ted doesn’t reach his fundraising goals now, North Carolina could flip Blue. We can’t take that chance. Friend, I don’t need to tell you how important it is that we protect our state from the schemes of the Radical Left. \- Brianna Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Erica Smith
subject: I know what it means to struggle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

It’s been nearly a month since we launched our campaign for North
Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District — and now, our campaign is coming up
on our first FEC fundraising deadline on December 31st.

My team asked that I reach out and explain why I hope you’ll make a
contribution to our campaign and support our movement to deliver NC-02 for
the people.

So, I’m going to share my personal story with you. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ]When you finish
reading, I hope you can chip in $5 — or anything you can —
to help us reach our big FEC fundraising goal and ensure we have the
resources to build a grassroots campaign powerful enough to defeat our
far-right GOP opponent.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ]Donate

My rural roots run deep in North Carolina and even deeper in
NC-02.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ][IMG]

My story starts in Northampton County, where my five siblings and I were
raised on a dirt road — the same dirt road that our mother was raised on.
My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on the family farm, and the rural
way of life still runs through my veins.

Even now, I spend my time doing what I’ve done since I was a little girl —
proudly harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ][IMG]

I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to
work all day to put food on the table for your family. And in fact, the
struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families
face today.

We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re
fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.
I’m running for Congress because our district needs someone who
understands the needs of our people, families, and communities.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ][IMG]

But here's the truth: Our political system sets candidates like me up to
fail. I don't come from wealth, and I don’t have a rolodex full of wealthy
donors. I refuse to accept even a cent from corporate PACs — I'm not
running to represent the corporate monopolies that have hollowed out our
district and rural communities across the country.

Our campaign has to work twice as hard to compete and win.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ]That’s why today, I’m personally asking you to make
your first donation
to our campaign for U.S. House. Every donation will help show the strength
of our movement on our first FEC report and will power our campaign
forward in the critical months ahead. Can I count on your support?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31445?refcode=em20211218-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT ]Donate

Thank you for hearing me out,

Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211218-700-footer&t=1026&refcode2=700_3698_v8g4IT&akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=700%2E3698%2Ev8g4IT

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Martin Etwop
subject: Cancelling today's event
body:
Dear friends,

Due to the severe weather in the Houston area, we are having to make the tough decision of cancelling our event that was scheduled for this afternoon. Your safety is much more important than us having a campaign event.

I look forward to scheduling the event on a different day where we can all safely attend and hear what our campaign has to offer to District 2 and the United States.

Thank you and God bless you.

Martin Etwop.

9856 Preserve Way
Conroe TX 77385
US

https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bIxMLBzMTLQcjGwcjBwcjLRGtKyMbAxMzOxM

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: No cap & trade. No masks. Help me fight!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f20f6325bf66/were-off-and-running-5138405?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# No cap and trade. No masks. Help me fight!

Dear Fellow Oregonian,

We're headed toward Christmas, New Year's Eve, and soon ... 2022. I've just come off another road trip, which carried me through central, western and southern Oregon again. You've seen the photos on my Facebook page of all the events. Just wait till you see what January looks like! I'm committed to reaching as many of you in person as I can - because I actually care about ALL of Oregon. On my mind this week:

\- Kate Brown just used her extreme liberal committee appointees to shove through the defeated cap and trade bill in the form of Oregon Administrative Rules. **These OARs are estimated to raise fuel costs 36 cents a gallon at the pump!** I will fire those appointees and reverse these devastating rules as fast as I can once elected. _The people did not want cap and trade._ She bypassed our legislature. She removed our ability to have a representative voice. Any Democrat elected in 2022 will continue the same. Don't let this happen!

\- Masks. Again. Oregon's Democrats are pushing through a PERMANENT mask mandate and the first steps of a vaccine passport. **_These mandates will go away with me as Governor. Period._** Our kids are sitting in freezing weather outside on plastic buckets spaced six feet apart for lunch at school - if they want food and air. Meanwhile, Kate Brown was in DC in a packed room hobnobbing with the rich - maskless. Rules for thee, but not for me was the clear message. Or was it - medical freedom for me, but not for thee?

My campaign needs your help. Have you used your $50 political tax credit yet? ($100 for couples filing jointly.) This is a CREDIT, not a deduction. It's so easy! Just donate $50 (or $100) to my campaign, and receive the full amount as a credit subtracted from your Oregon state taxes when you file. It’s like a free donation! _**Please donate today! **_ I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.**I am 100% grassroots! ** Some candidates aren't; they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring. Without excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. **Let's make sure that doesn't happen!**

_Thanks for your support!
Kerry_
---

Team, The Ohio State Supreme Court is setting deadlines set for our critical redistricting case, and the time for filing briefs is almost over. I have a brief of my own for you, and it’s a lot simpler than the convoluted games Republicans are using to try to manipulate the map: **I am ready to be your Secretary of State because I believe in protecting your rights, not making your choices for you.** This is an uphill battle, but I know that we can make it clear that we aren’t settling for less than fair. Right now we have a chance to strengthen our movement and send a message at the same time. [**Can you help us with a donation to the side that believes your vote matters?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815384/321538422/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211218supreme_N_CC_90D_4_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTk2NTE0NC0zNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bharOJY_sSQ6k7RPCgz1_p4MeJttTTdqnZ18u3tuHCs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39815385/321538423/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211218supreme_N_CC_90D_4_NG_N_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTk2NTE0NC0zNzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bharOJY_sSQ6k7RPCgz1_p4MeJttTTdqnZ18u3tuHCs=)

body:
Will you add your name? Friend, My name is Tiffany Shedd and I am a lifelong conservative running to be Arizona’s next Attorney General. Over the last year, we have seen Joe Biden open our border, trample on our constitutional rights, subvert the rule of law, and burden Arizonans with unconstitutional mandates. I am running to stand up to Joe Biden and his liberal friends while defending your rights from all of his government overreach over the last year. But in order to do that, I need to ensure my name is on the ballot so I can keep Arizona First. [**Friend, will you go to the Arizona Secretary of State’s website and add your name to my petition for Attorney General?**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0b9ebf3af2034004bd92ea8d89491d44&_e=dJGxW3h-9NRF2XTHVVnNh2xPZTVSx0XiCGLj76447ERTzGSEjdpsxrwNgkC-rMkw9pKaak6qv-KpQug_fup7IgS3o8WQLiYs1uF8ZQbUPZhje4BTvwHlPleWI_l-b_jG7v_hBU44C9vHO4P3hg63X4-J0HRPQKzQ8A8BRUMnC1J_PVkEDAQxE5mCaKaMR9Q4lYjOVKzx9plUHZ7E8LohhbKSzIPC4dy9SK2neXyBvcF1acPYgmQAW2EL3PGhNDF4D3Lj0ilo9ICaDMjIIQz-mA%3D%3D) **Thousands of conservatives have already signed my petition** , but Joe Biden’s liberal cronies will stop at nothing to prevent a strong conservative like me from getting on the ballot. That’s why I want to get so many signatures that liberal Democrats won’t even bother challenging them. Next year, Arizona will hold one of the most important elections in the history of our state. The Attorney General’s race will be the** _TOP TARGET_** for Democrats and the Radical Left will have MILLIONS and MILLIONS at their disposal. We can’t afford to hand Arizona to the Radical Left by nominating a weak Republican who can’t win or won’t stand up to the failing Biden administration. [**SIGN HERE TO GET A PROVEN**
**CONSERVATIVE ON THE BALLOT**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0b9ebf3af2034004bd92ea8d89491d44&_e=dJGxW3h-9NRF2XTHVVnNh2xPZTVSx0XiCGLj76447ESThq-dY3o0RXqeWRs8WAOYc_hCM6ZYHJd2fFmAnGBIZwd7iYUvDTm_waIqsxLfdtbaS748ln1TzHKjie0BhiWHcVuU3aG7Xe87iw2AoINI7MJVZ-5GgCVAn3yn4tbpYgmYd5UPN1Vsfbn0wrZnHfPNLIaAO7niARZr3oMhgu2780XYMumN3rSf9YzLC2L5IrnoBBCCIQykYpK2U6wpqa8GqzTJvOWYjT68ojHKZpwEXQ%3D%3D) I’m the only candidate with the lifelong conservative experience and credentials to continue this fight against left-wing Democrats. From defending your Second Amendment rights to taking on the cartels along drug and trafficking routes,** I will always put the interests of Arizonans first.** I hope I can count on you, Friend. I am so grateful for all of my grassroots supporters like you. Please sign my petition **[HERE](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=0b9ebf3af2034004bd92ea8d89491d44&_e=dJGxW3h-9NRF2XTHVVnNh2xPZTVSx0XiCGLj76447ESDFgtpsZSUxKLCwHv3wP9XrbbYYLnjqy5cgFjfd2v8dDrrKsZE1yDw7UE9aPcqaz4PpU43OluGqIEctkHPQ7DPK4UHTAEDsMHIIdGZ-FM1HDqkq3-Y4fpnousWwQMA9LzHj9LGR4XLuGhQKlgvuaXkLqL22jJaElot3xWh2WBNISHdL2tevB415LAOepYZcUVnoi60c72WsKKlo9nqKYZ5IZE3fb7mJTa2fa4_9sDiFQ%3D%3D).** Thank you, Tiffany Shedd PS: When you’re done signing, please forward this email to five of your conservative friends in Arizona. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Here are the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We really need your help right now | | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818990/321578984/-913685435?refcode=e20211218_facts-gif&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJhNmI2Ny02NzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9rktKIlkGPcKWE-CDlqjM-37O_z_xBiNpLKatAX6l4=) Here are the facts, friend:
* Maggie Hassan is the GOP's top target

* More money has been spent attacking Maggie than _any other Democratic incumbent this cycle_

* Republicans have flooded New Hampshire with over **$7 MILLION** , and there's more on the way

* We can't win without your support

News outlets and political pundits agree that **Maggie Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection**. And regardless of who the Republican nominee is, they will have the strong backing of Mitch McConnell and his dark money groups. If we're going to win here in New Hampshire and protect our fragile Senate majority, **we're going to need an army of grassroots supporters**. But this week, we fell short of our mid-month goal. When we miss a goal, even a small one, it leaves our campaign vulnerable. With our biggest FEC deadline just weeks away, falling short could cost us this election. **[So please, will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us get our fundraising back on track and protect this critical Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818991/321578986/-913685435?refcode=e20211218_facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJhNmI2Ny02NzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9rktKIlkGPcKWE-CDlqjM-37O_z_xBiNpLKatAX6l4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818992/321578988/-913685435?refcode=e20211218_facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJhNmI2Ny02NzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9rktKIlkGPcKWE-CDlqjM-37O_z_xBiNpLKatAX6l4=)
---
[Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818993/321578990/-913685435?refcode=e20211218_facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJhNmI2Ny02NzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9rktKIlkGPcKWE-CDlqjM-37O_z_xBiNpLKatAX6l4=)
[Chip in $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39818995/321578992/-913685435?refcode=e20211218_facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJhNmI2Ny02NzYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9rktKIlkGPcKWE-CDlqjM-37O_z_xBiNpLKatAX6l4=)

| Peter,

[_**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in before our mid-month deadline tonight. But first, let me explain why this request is so important.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39819087/321581169/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211218-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OThlODI0MS02OTYwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xOsDRIwcbZh4yYl16ZbQKKM7rJSp8Q25Rhh-Y2yOD8=)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm asking you for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1764%2E3611125%2E7QWnAv ][IMG]

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6335?t=1007&akid=1764%2E3611125%2E7QWnAv ]Friends—I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 to my campaign. But
first, a few facts about this race:

1. Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim
Democratic Senate majority. With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to
lose a single battleground race like this one.
2. National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this
race. One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a
super PAC.
3. I have multiple Republican opponents—not one of them is looking out
for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to
cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.
4. December is one of the worst months for online fundraising, and we
need to post strong numbers at the end of the year. Our opponents will
jump at the chance to outraise us.

We need to raise another $2,375 by midnight to stay on track for a strong
FEC report. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6335?t=1008&akid=1764%2E3611125%2E7QWnAv ]So, will you chip in just $5?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6335?t=1009&akid=1764%2E3611125%2E7QWnAv ]Donate $5

Together, I know we can pull this off.

—Tim

subject: We asked why you want to primary Sinema. Here's what you said:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
We finally got a chance to read your responses and wanted to share some. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPDf_gohcwlbTkARem3mb8x3r96bvvIBTs1cyY5AHjX67or97-YtepDqHR9mu6AGtYHBFS7oMF2kA2EFk0nNttJs2XMhbLhAVREC2oF5eXtPjMtFeXLzxV_KdfhKsrkXQoieMtth-o5SDYgHhtxwH9Hz8Kveu8m8pnNR2rYUpUMJmO8a_fpIZO-9trSi-Jp6_6oAh-GC9kreQVRReBwcYG-6lscPH2KbI5wL6kEDiGh7DKWHoMqYHjLsyQiXGljXOhBT4Ca342g317464UW1XsMI/3hy/0Hk9u51UQTqy2nD3Cc-QKg/h0/MQPmIqDkuBS-iQKxh1Jalf0BEFOomy-xRyupFtQf2qw)
Peter, Last month, we asked you to answer one question: **Why do you want to primary Kyrsten Sinema?** Many of the answers we received were terrific. body:
Will you let Democratic HQ know what's on your mind before midnight Sunday? | | | | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

Our FINAL grassroots priorities survey of the year is underway.

And since you're one of our very best grassroots supporters, we're counting on your input straight away.
**
Will you let Democratic HQ know what 's on your mind before midnight Sunday?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Please listen closely:

We just launched our FINAL grassroots priorities survey of the year.

**And before we begin the most important election year of our lives, we 're counting on you to submit your response straight away.**

**[Please, can we count on you to spare just 30 seconds to provide your critical grassroots input before our Sunday night deadline? There's not a moment to spare. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXkby2C_)**

In just one year we'll know whether our efforts to protect our Democratic House Majority have paid off.

And before that time comes, you have a critical choice to make:

_Will you sit on the sidelines and watch while Republicans march back into power at this fragile moment for our democracy?_

**Or will you include your voice in the fight to elect strong Democrats and defend our House Majority?**

**[There's too much at stake. Don't let our LAST grassroots priorities survey of the year pass you by. Please, submit your input IMMEDIATELY and let Democratic HQ know what's on your mind as we head into the 2022 election season.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-~)**
---
****
Thanks,

DCCC

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: Your chance to win a special edition Morganize against the world sweatshirt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We’re putting on a competition to say thank you to our supporters like YOU before the new year!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211218-464-footer-ak&t=2&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
As we approach 2022, we want to celebrate our movement’s achievements and give back to our supporters who have helped us build a people-powered, grassroots, small-dollar donor coalition.
That’s why we’re proud to announce we’re launching our **[Team Morganize sweatshirt competition!](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=3&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ) **
[**When you contribute any amount to our campaign before December 31st, you’ll be automatically entered to win a special edition Morganize against the world sweatshirt folks are already rocking across Ohio 🤩:**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=4&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=5&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=6&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=7&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
**[Enter to win »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18471?refcode=em20211218-464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)**
Already this year we’ve:
* Mobilized across the state of Ohio and beyond.
* Expanded our small grassroots team at our Ohio headquarters.
* Organized for reproductive justice, racial justice, and a better healthcare system.
* Recruited thousands of volunteers to knock on doors and get out into the community (even in a blizzard!) to spread the word about Morgan and our movement for a better Ohio.
* Stood up to Tim Ryan and demanded he debate us (which he’s still refusing to do, by the way).
* Received endorsements from the Collective PAC, Elect Black Women PAC, **and more.**

All this was achieved by a movement built by people like you pitching in $1, $5, or even $27 contributions at a time. **Thank you.**
Now, we’re happy for an opportunity to give back – with a special edition Morganize against the world sweatshirt.
[**If you’d like to participate, follow this link to contribute, and you’ll have the chance to win and rock a Morganize against the world sweatshirt!**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18470?t=9&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)
**[Enter to win »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18471?refcode=em20211218-464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)**
Thank you for everything you do,
Team Morganize
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211218-464-footer&t=11&refcode2=464_90090_0UEATJ&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=464%2E90090%2E0UEATJ)

subject: Help us stop Biden's Spending Spree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We must fight back against Build Back Better. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

For months, President Biden has assured Americans that his "Build Back Better" plan would pay for itself. The Democrats and the mainstream media have been continually pushing this narrative.

That sounds great, but the only problem is that we now know _**it was all a lie.**_
---
| This week, we learned the truth. **This radical bill will add over $3 TRILLION to our already out of control debt.**

[Will you donate now to help us fight back?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=96c8e6cbff&e=1050d051da)
---
| [Chip in $25 to Reject Radical Liberal Policies](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5a5e24306f&e=1050d051da "Chip in $25 to Reject Radical Liberal Policies")
---
| This year, we've seen **gas and energy prices rise, record border crossings, skyrocketing inflation on essential goods, supply chain disruptions, Americans stranded in Afghanistan,** and many more crises that continue to rage on today.

Instead of addressing these issues that affect us all, Democrats want to spend another $4.9 TRILLION.

**And they're paying for it by raising YOUR taxes.**
---
| [$10 to Take Back the House](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fd68720645&e=1050d051da "$10 to Take Back the House")
---
| Biden has another plan to reduce this massive deficit spike: **Weaponizing the IRS to audit ALL Americans at a higher rate.**

We need to make sure this is the last time Pelosi has control of the gavel.

_**This spending will affect our children and our grandchildren.**_ This is irresponsible and wrong.

Help us Fire Pelosi, and show Biden that Americans reject his radical policies.
---
| [$100 to Bring Fiscal Responsibility to Washington](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c1e4221e60&e=1050d051da "$100 to Bring Fiscal Responsibility to Washington")
---
| Democrats know we're winning. They know patriots have our backs. And they know we can beat them with exactly the kind of grassroots support that got Jake elected last year.

**This is a fight we cannot afford to lose.** With your help, we'll make sure we bring true Conservative values to Washington.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
| [Donate Now. Anything helps.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=cc5b91f4e7&e=1050d051da "Donate Now. Anything helps.")

name: REQUESTING YOUR URGENT RESPONSE (via DCCC)
subject: you WON’T complete Dem HQ’s survey??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you let Democratic HQ know what's on your mind before midnight Sunday? | | | | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

Our FINAL grassroots priorities survey of the year is underway.

And since you're one of our very best grassroots supporters, we're counting on your input straight away.
**
Will you let Democratic HQ know what 's on your mind before midnight Sunday?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Please listen closely:

We just launched our FINAL grassroots priorities survey of the year.

**And before we begin the most important election year of our lives, we 're counting on you to submit your response straight away.**

**[Please, can we count on you to spare just 30 seconds to provide your critical grassroots input before our Sunday night deadline? There's not a moment to spare. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_X-)**

In just one year we'll know whether our efforts to protect our Democratic House Majority have paid off.

And before that time comes, you have a critical choice to make:

_Will you sit on the sidelines and watch while Republicans march back into power at this fragile moment for our democracy?_

**Or will you include your voice in the fight to elect strong Democrats and defend our House Majority?**

**[There's too much at stake. Don't let our LAST grassroots priorities survey of the year pass you by. Please, submit your input IMMEDIATELY and let Democratic HQ know what's on your mind as we head into the 2022 election season.](https://links.e.dccc.)**
---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46127620&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjEwODMyNgS2&l=14269870&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46127620&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjEwODMyNgS2&l=14269870&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
