name: Cheri Beasley
subject: NC-Sen Rating: TOSS UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4447?t=6&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy) I’m running for North Carolina’s open Senate seat — one of the most competitive races for 2022.

That’s no exaggeration. The Cook Political Report, a top nonpartisan elections forecaster, ranked North Carolina as one of the only toss-up races in the entire country.

That means this is a critical race in Democrats’ fight to hold the Senate majority. To pull it off, we’re counting on lots of grassroots support.

[Can you split a $5 donation between our grassroots campaign to flip North Carolina and VPP? We can deliver real change for working people and winning this race could decide the Senate majority! ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4448?t=7&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy) | [RUSH $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4448?t=8&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
---
Look, Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and their allies are all doing whatever it takes to keep this seat for themselves and their interests. They will spend and say anything that it takes to stop Democrats from making progress on the issues that matter most.

Bottom line: Our campaign is one of Democrats’ best chances to expand the Senate majority, and I know what it takes to win.

In 2019, I had the honor of making history as the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of North Carolina’s Supreme Court, and I’m the only African American woman running for Senate anywhere in the country with a record of winning statewide. And I’ve done it twice — more than anyone else in this race.

We can turn North Carolina blue in 2022, but I cannot do it alone.

[Please consider making a $5 donation to our campaign before the FEC deadline. Winning a competitive race like this requires each of us to do our part. ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4448?t=9&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4449?t=10&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4450?t=11&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4451?t=12&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4452?t=13&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4447?t=14&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
There’s no doubt this will be a tough race, but this is our opportunity to make real progress together.

Cheri Beasley
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1025%2E878179%2EIQ9vTy)

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: why today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Quick question for ya...
#

**Quick question for ya: Have you been waiting for an important moment to make your first contribution to Cheri’s campaign?**
Well, I’m reaching out to let you know that today is that day!
If you haven’t heard the news, Cheri just became our presumptive Democratic nominee for 2022. And the timing couldn’t be better, because there is an FEC deadline just around the corner.
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211218-1-rec&refcode2=150.357359.MKfydI&t=1&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI)**
My team and I have to start planning for the general election right now. Our budget meetings are already ramping up because we know national Republicans plan to flood our state with millions to try to buy this seat – they already are.
So I’m hoping I can count on a HUGE outpouring of support from people like y’all to help us get prepared to fight back, and your first donation today would go a long way toward just that.
**[If you can, I hope you’ll consider making your first donation today. This is a critical moment for us to prove that our grassroots movement can win North Carolina, and every dollar will be put directly to work to flip this seat and elect Cheri.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211218-1-rec&refcode2=150.357359.MKfydI&t=2&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211218-1-rec&refcode2=150.357359.MKfydI&t=3&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI)**
Thank you for being part of this because a race as big as this one really does take all of us!
Let’s get to work!!
Travis Brimm
Campaign Manager

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=150_357359_MKfydI&akid=150%2E357359%2EMKfydI) today to help us make history.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I hope you take a minute to watch the video I recorded for you. Hear why we can’t keep spending money we don’t have. I hope you take a minute to watch the video I recorded for you, Peter, and hear why we can't keep spending money we don't have. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5f6f6d6d6014d4bb900efcd0acec8be&_e=5V-pVVkUl1Mh9JxRRPzUyHz3ua9nF9QwBuxCDrecIV-Sx_YZZM289OYYs0z7gewqijD2ER3TW9pV_iIA6TtVWXeazTR25VRJTRZY6e7QksMtt3tCBtPwvd4EjVl_ikF8MvPlULqefDxW4C8FLbHDCbfB9Bb_xz7sNB3t2NWCQ3FMPmu2wvh75UTwRfy2dvXrmyTzThYiFfoUEF2yUc34OyZ79OKFw1b91GcjlkPBeTdpP0BshNznH_VEWJFs3Oo_volwKEqp1ATxIguJDP1EfIDR0zvdQNbq--iRmLnbOdRg7IV9DDbm7RivLrANbMnr5Vs0ndrVGZi4nmKnN7QoYFmzMdnWS0cuqeauF4bkr3fHeyG6zp3XkpBbJ1apUvABpT06eidNSfm0rP9E59NKcd7YjFipPhb-bu0MfY4w0MdcEdZxi8OdK-CGabJKUdhkQILeZOttpnMO0CklMRTiLVFbRsJX3pxAjYzyisQZCG8%3D)

---
Peter,

**[I recorded a brief video for you about the out-of-control spending in Washington, Peter, and I hope you'll take 40 seconds to watch it.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5f6f6d6d6014d4bb900efcd0acec8be&_e=5V-pVVkUl1Mh9JxRRPzUyHz3ua9nF9QwBuxCDrecIV-Sx_YZZM289OYYs0z7gewqijD2ER3TW9pV_iIA6TtVWXeazTR25VRJTRZY6e7QksMtt3tCBtPwvd4EjVl_ikF8MvPlULqefDxW4C8FLbHDCbfB9Bb_xz7sNB3t2NWCQ3FMPmu2wvh75UTwRfy2dvXrmyTzThYiFfoUEF2yUc34OyZ79OKFw1b91GcjlkPBeTdpP0BshNznH_VEWJFs3Oo_volwKEqp1ATxIguJDP1EfGY6niTAQRiS8RSk6kyvoqcsSiZZrz8Lu6PuxSe1GHYApz-txzaHKgC_2aSCV8tG9lE8bunL4OTYN-UD9ewccmpp6R9CZL87HHtJX_XOI7gOpO-vn3VHY8-0hi0hqvJViXGeo0B-xHOvF0Mz39OqNZpJxHOtIv3Ip5Gp0K_nWZ3kN1nbp0NK-cI1KS134AIAZv8kkIqR4gug5tQjJWm-zfY%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5f6f6d6d6014d4bb900efcd0acec8be&_e=5V-pVVkUl1Mh9JxRRPzUyHz3ua9nF9QwBuxCDrecIV-Sx_YZZM289OYYs0z7gewqijD2ER3TW9pV_iIA6TtVWXeazTR25VRJTRZY6e7QksMtt3tCBtPwvd4EjVl_ikF8MvPlULqefDxW4C8FLbHDCbfB9Bb_xz7sNB3t2NWCQ3FMPmu2wvh75UTwRfy2dvXrmyTzThYiFfoUEF2yUc34OyZ79OKFw1b91GcjlkPBeTdpP0BshNznH_VEWJFs3Oo_volwKEqp1ATxIguJDP1EfH5451PowGuDnJwp-uLVkSQHmBj-lz5rM5M5RJUsjmM8rW13hhOH3FcQyrR4nKt27e5mTCICPuvJBX3tCh1MvW1QGlZnCJd5Gi6y4r_VwzTi873Fvf995KXIjCCY5UBf91IJbaq5HEDcixfnG_U8-reXGoj3zxCdGdWUywXDVsdB1VcLsHR-zgId-CTdDiJcU-SYnmKjQvdIoE4g1GpTSOc%3D)
Let me explain to you what's really going on - the Democrats want to spend trillions more than we're making, and they're counting on the Republicans to bail them out.

Americans are paying the price through higher taxes, skyrocketing inflation, and more government intrusion in our lives. We can't continue to do this.

How do we solve the spending crisis? It's simple. We elect strong conservatives who will STOP the Democrats from crippling our country and take back the Senate Majority.

**[I hope you'll watch the brief video I recorded for you and then consider chipping in a couple of dollars to support my conservative campaign for the U.S. Senate.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5f6f6d6d6014d4bb900efcd0acec8be&_e=5V-pVVkUl1Mh9JxRRPzUyHz3ua9nF9QwBuxCDrecIV-Sx_YZZM289OYYs0z7gewqijD2ER3TW9pV_iIA6TtVWXeazTR25VRJTRZY6e7QksMtt3tCBtPwvd4EjVl_ikF8MvPlULqefDxW4C8FLbHDCbfB9Bb_xz7sNB3t2NWCQ3FMPmu2wvh75UTwRfy2dvXrmyTzThYiFfoUEF2yUc34OyZ79OKFw1b91GcjlkPBeTdpP0BshNznH_VEWJFs3Oo_volwKEqp1ATxIguJDP1EfBifpcenh40tshNd6yFzj9D3hueG1Ul-g5jYLajQ3riS-UvaYe_Kge-fEdXus4b3OohPpHXdPu2-Sw3My0zKzhKWvqHJDJL0D7uT0QKNoPwCJ05ZUWSp18dhRKaefrLxYmYZtwCFuonztm1u_lrb5vQ6wkjgNyHO69DzeQBPciKH8_qDwzsUQhHPINGLedYX5Cc-flXtej3QBmXPHuqkgH4%3D)**

clean_body: I hope you take a minute to watch the video I recorded for you. Hear why we can’t keep spending money we don’t have. I hope you take a minute to watch the video I recorded for you, Peter, and hear why we can't keep spending money we don't have. | Peter, Let me explain to you what's really going on - the Democrats want to spend trillions more than we're making, and they're counting on the Republicans to bail them out. Americans are paying the price through higher taxes, skyrocketing inflation, and more government intrusion in our lives. We can't continue to do this. How do we solve the spending crisis? It's simple. We elect strong conservatives who will STOP the Democrats from crippling our country and take back the Senate Majority. I know money is tight in this uncertain Biden economy, so we don't make this request lightly. Please know how grateful we are for your support. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._
